channel.title: NUVO MAXX
channel.description: Project Management, Logistics, Cement Distribution, Consultancy & Business Development

item.title: Home
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
<style>

/* NUVO MAXX — Stylesheet */
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Montserrat:wght@400;600;700;800;900&family=Open+Sans:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap');

* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

:root {
  /* Ghana-inspired palette on a black canvas: red, gold/yellow, green. */
  --primary-bg: #000000;
  --secondary-bg: #0a0a0a;
  --card-bg: #141414;
  --light-grey: #e8e8e8;
  --mid-grey: #8a8a8a;
  --accent: #e8b94a;            /* Ghana gold / yellow */
  --accent-hover: #f0c860;
  --accent-gold: #e8b94a;
  --accent-red: #ce1126;        /* Ghana red */
  --accent-green: #006b3f;      /* Ghana green */
  --text-primary: #ffffff;
  --text-secondary: #c9c9c9;
  --border-subtle: #1f1f1f;
}

html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

body {
  font-family: 'Open Sans', 'Inter', sans-serif;
  background-color: var(--primary-bg);
  color: var(--text-primary);
  line-height: 1.65;
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
  position: relative;
}
body::before {
  content: '';
  position: fixed;
  inset: 0;
  background-image: url('images/nuvo-tree-ghana.png');
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  background-position: center center;
  background-size: min(1100px, 95vw) auto;
  mix-blend-mode: screen;
  opacity: 0.22;
  filter: contrast(1.05) saturate(1.1);
  z-index: 0;
  pointer-events: none;
}
body > * { position: relative; z-index: 1; }



h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 {
  font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
  font-weight: 800;
  line-height: 1.2;
  color: var(--text-primary);
}

a { color: var(--accent); text-decoration: none; transition: all 0.3s ease; }
a:hover { color: var(--accent-hover); }

img { max-width: 100%; display: block; }

/* ===== Navbar ===== */
.navbar {
  position: sticky;
  top: 0;
  z-index: 1000;
  background: var(--primary-bg);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
}
.nav-container {
  max-width: 1400px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 14px 5%;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 24px;
}
.nav-logo img { height: 116px; width: auto; }
.nav-menu {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 28px;
  list-style: none;
}
.nav-menu a {
  color: var(--text-primary);
  font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: 14px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  transition: color 0.3s ease;
}
.nav-menu a:hover { color: var(--accent); }
.nav-menu a.active { color: var(--accent); }

.btn {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 12px 26px;
  background: var(--accent);
  color: #fff;
  font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 14px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  border: 2px solid var(--accent);
  border-radius: 6px;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
}
.btn:hover { background: var(--accent-hover); border-color: var(--accent-hover); color: #fff; }
.btn-outline {
  background: transparent;
  color: #fff;
  border: 2px solid #fff;
}
.btn-outline:hover { background: #fff; color: var(--primary-bg); }
.btn-dark {
  background: var(--primary-bg);
  border-color: var(--primary-bg);
  color: #fff;
}
.btn-dark:hover { background: #000; border-color: #000; color: #fff; }

.hamburger {
  display: none;
  background: none;
  border: none;
  color: #fff;
  font-size: 26px;
  cursor: pointer;
}

/* ===== Hero ===== */
.hero {
  position: relative;
  min-height: 78vh;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  text-align: center;
  padding: 100px 5%;
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
}
.hero::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  background: rgba(10,10,10,0.72);
}
.hero-content { position: relative; z-index: 2; max-width: 900px; }
.hero h1 {
  font-size: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 3.6rem);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 22px;
}
.hero p {
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  margin-bottom: 36px;
  max-width: 720px;
  margin-left: auto;
  margin-right: auto;
}
.hero-buttons { display: flex; gap: 16px; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap; }

.page-hero { min-height: 48vh; }
.page-hero h1 { font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 4vw, 3rem); }

/* ===== Section base ===== */
section { padding: 80px 5%; }
.container { max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; }

.section-heading {
  text-align: center;
  margin-bottom: 56px;
}
.section-heading h2 {
  font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 3vw, 2.4rem);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 2px;
  position: relative;
  padding-bottom: 18px;
  display: inline-block;
}
.section-heading h2::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 0;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  width: 60px;
  height: 3px;
  background: var(--accent);
}
.section-heading p {
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  margin-top: 14px;
  max-width: 680px;
  margin-left: auto;
  margin-right: auto;
}

/* ===== Stats ===== */
.stats {
  background: var(--secondary-bg);
  padding: 50px 5%;
}
.stats-grid {
  max-width: 1280px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  gap: 24px;
}
.stat-tile {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  padding: 32px 22px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  text-align: center;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
}
.stat-tile:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(232,185,74,0.25); }
.stat-tile i { font-size: 2.4rem; color: var(--accent); margin-bottom: 14px; }
.stat-tile h3 { font-size: 1.25rem; margin-bottom: 6px; }
.stat-tile p { color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 0.9rem; }

/* ===== Services Cards ===== */
.services-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 28px;
}
.service-card {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border-top: 3px solid var(--accent);
  padding: 38px 28px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
}
.service-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(232,185,74,0.25); }
.service-card i { font-size: 2.6rem; color: var(--accent); margin-bottom: 18px; }
.service-card h3 { font-size: 1.35rem; margin-bottom: 14px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; }
.service-card p { color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 18px; }
.service-card a.learn-more {
  color: var(--accent);
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  font-size: 13px;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
}

/* ===== Why Tiles ===== */
.why-section { background: var(--secondary-bg); }
.why-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  gap: 24px;
}
.why-tile {
  text-align: center;
  padding: 28px 20px;
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border-radius: 10px;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
}
.why-tile:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(232,185,74,0.25); }
.why-tile i { font-size: 2.2rem; color: var(--accent); margin-bottom: 14px; }
.why-tile h4 { font-size: 1.1rem; margin-bottom: 10px; }
.why-tile p { color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 0.92rem; }
.see-all { text-align: center; margin-top: 36px; }
.see-all a { font-family: 'Montserrat'; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; }

/* ===== CTA Banner ===== */
.cta-banner {
  background: var(--accent);
  text-align: center;
  padding: 60px 5%;
}
.cta-banner h2 {
  font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 3vw, 2.2rem);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
  color: #fff;
}
.cta-banner p { color: #fff; margin-bottom: 26px; font-size: 1.05rem; }

/* ===== Testimonials ===== */
.testimonials-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 28px;
}
.testimonial-card {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  padding: 36px 28px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  position: relative;
  border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
}
.testimonial-card .quote-mark {
  font-size: 3rem;
  color: var(--accent);
  font-family: 'Montserrat';
  line-height: 1;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}
.testimonial-card blockquote { color: #fff; font-style: italic; margin-bottom: 20px; }
.testimonial-author {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 14px;
}
.author-photo {
  width: 54px;
  height: 54px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--secondary-bg);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  color: var(--accent);
  font-size: 1.5rem;
  border: 2px solid var(--accent);
}
.author-info strong { display: block; color: #fff; }
.author-info span { color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 0.88rem; }

/* ===== About Sections ===== */
.two-col {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 56px;
  align-items: center;
}
.two-col h2 {
  font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 3vw, 2.2rem);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 22px;
  position: relative;
  padding-bottom: 16px;
}
.two-col h2::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 0; left: 0;
  width: 60px; height: 3px;
  background: var(--accent);
}
.two-col p { color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 16px; }
.col-image {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border-radius: 10px;
  min-height: 380px;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  text-align: center;
  padding: 24px;
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
}

.mission-section, .vision-section {
  background: var(--secondary-bg);
  text-align: center;
}
.mission-section .container, .vision-section .container { max-width: 900px; }
.mission-section h2, .vision-section h2 {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 2px;
  font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 3vw, 2rem);
  margin-bottom: 20px;
  position: relative;
  padding-bottom: 16px;
  display: inline-block;
}
.mission-section h2::after, .vision-section h2::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 0; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%);
  width: 60px; height: 3px; background: var(--accent);
}
.mission-section p, .vision-section p { color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 1.1rem; }

.values-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  gap: 24px;
}
.value-tile {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  padding: 32px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  border-left: 4px solid var(--accent);
}
.value-tile h4 {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
  color: var(--accent);
}
.value-tile p { color: var(--text-secondary); }

.reg-card {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border-left: 4px solid var(--accent);
  padding: 32px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  max-width: 760px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}
.reg-card h3 {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
  color: var(--accent);
}
.reg-card ul { list-style: none; }
.reg-card li {
  padding: 10px 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  color: var(--text-secondary);
}
.reg-card li:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.reg-card li strong { color: #fff; display: inline-block; min-width: 200px; }

/* ===== Service Detail Sections ===== */
.service-detail { padding: 80px 5%; }
.service-detail:nth-child(even) { background: var(--secondary-bg); }
.service-detail .two-col { gap: 56px; }
.service-detail.reverse .two-col { direction: rtl; }
.service-detail.reverse .two-col > * { direction: ltr; }
.feature-list {
  list-style: none;
  margin-top: 22px;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 10px;
}
.feature-list li {
  color: #fff;
  padding-left: 26px;
  position: relative;
}
.feature-list li::before {
  content: '00c';
  font-family: 'Font Awesome 6 Free';
  font-weight: 900;
  color: var(--accent);
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
}

/* ===== Why Us reasons ===== */
.reasons-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  gap: 28px;
}
.reason-card {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  padding: 32px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
}
.reason-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(232,185,74,0.25); }
.reason-card i { font-size: 2rem; color: var(--accent); margin-bottom: 14px; }
.reason-card h3 {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
}
.reason-card p { color: var(--text-secondary); }

/* ===== Comparison Table ===== */
.comparison-table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border-radius: 10px;
  overflow: hidden;
  margin-top: 30px;
}
.comparison-table th, .comparison-table td {
  padding: 16px 20px;
  text-align: left;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
}
.comparison-table th {
  background: var(--secondary-bg);
  color: #fff;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
}
.comparison-table th.brand { color: var(--accent); }
.comparison-table td { color: var(--text-secondary); }
.comparison-table .check { color: #2ecc71; font-size: 1.2rem; }
.comparison-table .cross { color: #e74c3c; font-size: 1.2rem; }

/* ===== Projects ===== */
.projects-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 28px;
}
.project-card {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border-radius: 10px;
  overflow: hidden;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.project-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(232,185,74,0.25); }
.project-image {
  height: 200px;
  background: var(--secondary-bg);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  padding: 16px;
  text-align: center;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  border-bottom: 3px solid var(--accent);
}
.project-body { padding: 24px; flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
.project-body h3 {
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
}
.project-body p { color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 16px; flex: 1; }
.project-meta { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
.location-tag { color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 0.85rem; }
.location-tag i { color: var(--accent); margin-right: 4px; }
.badge {
  background: var(--accent);
  color: #fff;
  padding: 4px 12px;
  border-radius: 20px;
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
}

.cta-strip {
  background: var(--secondary-bg);
  padding: 60px 5%;
  text-align: center;
}
.cta-strip h3 {
  font-size: clamp(1.3rem, 2.5vw, 1.8rem);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 22px;
}

/* ===== Contact ===== */
.contact-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.4fr;
  gap: 48px;
}
.contact-info { background: var(--card-bg); padding: 36px; border-radius: 10px; }
.contact-info h3 {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 22px;
  color: var(--accent);
}
.contact-item {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  gap: 14px;
  padding: 14px 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
}
.contact-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.contact-item i { color: var(--accent); font-size: 1.2rem; margin-top: 4px; min-width: 22px; }
.contact-item strong { display: block; color: #fff; margin-bottom: 2px; }
.contact-item span, .contact-item a { color: var(--text-secondary); }
.contact-item a:hover { color: var(--accent); }

.contact-form { background: var(--card-bg); padding: 36px; border-radius: 10px; }
.contact-form h3 {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 22px;
  color: var(--accent);
}
.form-group { margin-bottom: 18px; }
.form-group label {
  display: block;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  margin-bottom: 6px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
}
.form-group input,
.form-group select,
.form-group textarea {
  width: 100%;
  padding: 12px 14px;
  background: var(--primary-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  border-radius: 6px;
  color: #fff;
  font-family: inherit;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  transition: border-color 0.3s ease;
}
.form-group input:focus,
.form-group select:focus,
.form-group textarea:focus {
  outline: none;
  border-color: var(--accent);
}
.map-section { padding: 0; }
.map-section iframe { width: 100%; height: 420px; border: none; display: block; }

/* ===== Footer ===== */
.footer {
  background: var(--primary-bg);
  padding: 70px 5% 0;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
}
.footer-grid {
  max-width: 1280px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1.4fr 1fr 1fr 1.2fr;
  gap: 40px;
}
.footer-col h4 {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 18px;
  color: var(--accent);
  font-size: 1rem;
}
.footer-col img { height: 60px; margin-bottom: 18px; }
.footer-col p { color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 14px; font-size: 0.92rem; }
.footer-col ul { list-style: none; }
.footer-col li { margin-bottom: 10px; }
.footer-col a { color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 0.92rem; }
.footer-col a:hover { color: var(--accent); }
.footer-col .contact-line { display: flex; gap: 10px; align-items: flex-start; margin-bottom: 10px; color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 0.92rem; }
.footer-col .contact-line i { color: var(--accent); margin-top: 4px; }
.tagline {
  color: #fff !important;
  font-family: 'Montserrat';
  font-weight: 600;
  font-style: italic;
}
.social-row { display: flex; gap: 12px; margin-top: 14px; }
.social-row a {
  width: 38px; height: 38px;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border-radius: 50%;
  color: #fff;
}
.social-row a:hover { background: var(--accent); color: #fff; }

.footer-bottom {
  max-width: 1280px;
  margin: 50px auto 0;
  padding: 22px 0;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  text-align: center;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  font-size: 0.88rem;
}
.ghana-stripe {
  display: flex;
  width: 100%;
  height: 6px;
}
.ghana-stripe span { flex: 1; height: 100%; }
.ghana-red { background: #ce1126; }
.ghana-gold { background: #fcd116; }
.ghana-green { background: #006b3f; }

/* ===== Responsive ===== */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
  .stats-grid, .why-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
  .services-grid, .testimonials-grid, .projects-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
  .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
}
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  section { padding: 50px 4%; }
  .hamburger { display: block; }
  .nav-menu {
    position: absolute;
    top: 100%; left: 0; right: 0;
    background: var(--primary-bg);
    flex-direction: column;
    padding: 20px;
    gap: 18px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
    display: none;
  }
  .nav-menu.open { display: flex; }
  .nav-menu .btn { width: 100%; text-align: center; }
  .two-col { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 32px; }
  .service-detail.reverse .two-col { direction: ltr; }
  .reasons-grid, .values-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .services-grid, .testimonials-grid, .projects-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .contact-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 28px; }
  .feature-list { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .comparison-table { font-size: 0.85rem; }
  .comparison-table th, .comparison-table td { padding: 10px; }
  .reg-card li strong { display: block; min-width: 0; }
}
@media (max-width: 480px) {
  .stats-grid, .why-grid, .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .hero-buttons { flex-direction: column; align-items: stretch; }
  .hero-buttons .btn { width: 100%; text-align: center; }
}

/* ===== Image-driven sections ===== */
.hero::before {
  background: rgba(0,0,0,0.65);
}
.col-image {
  background-color: var(--card-bg);
  min-height: 420px;
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
}
.col-image span { display: none; }
.project-image {
  height: 220px;
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  background-color: var(--secondary-bg);
}
.project-image span { display: none; }
.cta-banner { background: var(--accent-red); }
.stat-tile i,
.service-card i,
.why-tile i,
.reason-card i { color: #fff; filter: drop-shadow(0 2px 8px rgba(232,185,74,0.4)); }
.service-card { border-top-width: 4px; }
.author-photo { background: var(--accent); color: #fff; border-color: var(--accent); }
.testimonial-card .quote-mark { color: var(--accent-gold); }
.section-heading h2::after,
.two-col h2::after,
.mission-section h2::after,
.vision-section h2::after { background: var(--accent); height: 4px; width: 80px; }

/* Clients / Trusted-by grid */
.clients-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  gap: 24px;
  margin-top: 20px;
}
.client-tile {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 32px 20px;
  text-align: center;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 14px;
  transition: transform .25s ease, box-shadow .25s ease, border-color .25s ease;
}
.client-tile:hover {
  transform: translateY(-4px);
  border-color: var(--accent-green);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(232,185,74,0.18);
}
.client-tile i { font-size: 2rem; color: var(--accent); }
.client-tile span { color: #fff; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1rem; }
@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .clients-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
}

/* ===== Brochure styling overrides ===== */
.hero::before {
  background: rgba(0,0,0,0.72);
}
.cta-banner { background: var(--accent-red); }

/* Icon backgrounds (solid gold/yellow) */
.service-card,
.why-tile,
.reason-card,
.stat-tile {
  border-top: none;
  border-left: none;
}
.service-card { border-top: 4px solid var(--accent-green); }

.service-card i,
.why-tile i,
.reason-card i,
.stat-tile i,
.client-tile i {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  width: 64px;
  height: 64px;
  background: var(--accent);
  color: #fff;
  border-radius: 8px;
  font-size: 1.6rem;
  filter: none;
  margin-bottom: 18px;
}
.client-tile i { width: 56px; height: 56px; font-size: 1.4rem; }

/* Brochure image strip — full-bleed alternating image+text */
.brochure-strip {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 0;
  background: var(--secondary-bg);
}
.brochure-strip .img,
.brochure-strip .copy {
  min-height: 360px;
}
.brochure-strip .img {
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
}
.brochure-strip .copy {
  padding: 60px 6%;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
}
.brochure-strip .copy h2 {
  color: var(--accent);
  font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 3vw, 2.2rem);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 18px;
}
.brochure-strip .copy p { color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 14px; }
.brochure-strip.reverse .img { order: 2; }

/* Image mosaic — brochure-style picture grid */
.image-mosaic {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  grid-auto-rows: 200px;
  gap: 16px;
}
.image-mosaic .tile {
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  border-radius: 8px;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.image-mosaic .tile.wide { grid-column: span 2; }
.image-mosaic .tile.tall { grid-row: span 2; }
.image-mosaic .tile .label {
  position: absolute;
  left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0;
  background: linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.92), rgba(0,0,0,0));
  color: #fff;
  padding: 28px 18px 14px;
  font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
}
.image-mosaic .tile.accent {
  background: var(--accent);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  color: #fff;
  text-align: center;
  padding: 24px;
  font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
  font-weight: 800;
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1.5px;
}

@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .brochure-strip { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .brochure-strip.reverse .img { order: 0; }
  .image-mosaic { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); grid-auto-rows: 160px; }
  .image-mosaic .tile.wide { grid-column: span 2; }
}

/* Ghana stripe → brochure stripe (orange) */
.ghana-stripe { background: var(--accent); height: 6px; }
.ghana-stripe span { display: none; }

/* Footer accent */
.footer-col h4 { color: var(--accent); }


</style>


<header class="navbar">
  <div class="nav-container">
    <a href="/" class="nav-logo"><img src="/wp-content/uploads/nuvomaxx/nuvo_maxx.png" alt="NUVO MAXX — Ghanaian freight, logistics and cement distribution company logo" /></a>
    <button class="hamburger" aria-label="Toggle menu"><i class="fa-solid fa-bars"></i></button>
    <ul class="nav-menu">
      <li><a href="/" class="active">Home</a></li>
      <li><a href="/about/">About Us</a></li>
      <li><a href="/services/">Services</a></li>
      <li><a href="/why-us/">Why Us</a></li>
      <li><a href="/projects/">Projects</a></li>
      <li><a href="/contact/">Contact Us</a></li>
      <li><a href="/contact/" class="btn">Get a Quote</a></li>
    </ul>
  </div>
</header>

<main>
  <section class="hero" style="background-image: url('/wp-content/uploads/nuvomaxx/brochure-ship.jpg');">

    <div class="hero-content">
      <h1>Project Management • Logistics • Cement Distribution • Consultancy • Business Development</h1>
      <p>A registered Ghanaian company based in Tema, delivering trusted services across Ghana, West Africa and beyond.</p>
      <div class="hero-buttons">
        <a href="/services/" class="btn">Our Services</a>
        <a href="/contact/" class="btn btn-outline">Get a Quote</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="stats">
    <div class="stats-grid">
      <div class="stat-tile"><i class="fa-solid fa-truck-fast"></i><h3>500+ Shipments</h3><p>Successfully delivered</p></div>
      <div class="stat-tile"><i class="fa-solid fa-helmet-safety"></i><h3>3 Core Services</h3><p>Freight, logistics, cement</p></div>
      <div class="stat-tile"><i class="fa-solid fa-location-dot"></i><h3>Based in Tema</h3><p>Serving all of Ghana</p></div>
      <div class="stat-tile"><i class="fa-solid fa-circle-check"></i><h3>Registered & Certified</h3><p>BN858050923</p></div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="brochure-strip">
    <div class="img" style="background-image: url('/wp-content/uploads/nuvomaxx/dzata-bags.jpg');"></div>
    <div class="copy">
      <h2>About Us</h2>
      <p>NUVO MAXX is a registered Ghanaian company headquartered in Tema, Greater Accra, with operations across Burkina Faso, Nigeria, Mali, Niger, Togo, Côte d'Ivoire, and Morocco. We deliver project management, logistics, cement distribution, consultancy, and business development to clients throughout West Africa and beyond.</p>
      <p>From the port of Tema to construction sites and commercial hubs across the region, we keep African business moving — reliably, transparently, and on time.</p>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="brochure-strip reverse">
    <div class="img" style="background-image: url('/wp-content/uploads/nuvomaxx/brochure-port-workers.png');"></div>
    <div class="copy">
      <h2>Why Choose Us?</h2>
      <p><strong style="color:#fff">1.</strong> Deep regional expertise across Ghana, West Africa, and North Africa's ports, road networks, and regulations.</p>
      <p><strong style="color:#fff">2.</strong> Transparent pricing with clear quotes upfront — no hidden charges.</p>
      <p><strong style="color:#fff">3.</strong> End-to-end service, from first call to final delivery.</p>
      <p><strong style="color:#fff">4.</strong> A registered, certified team you can trust on every shipment.</p>
    </div>
  </section>


  <section>
    <div class="container">
      <div class="section-heading">
        <h2>What We Do</h2>
        <p>Five core capabilities, one trusted partner.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="services-grid">
        <div class="service-card">
          <i class="fa-solid fa-diagram-project"></i>
          <h3>Project Management</h3>
          <p>End-to-end planning, coordination, and execution of complex projects — keeping scope, timeline, and budget on track from kickoff to handover.</p>
          <a href="/services/" class="learn-more">Learn More →</a>
        </div>
        <div class="service-card">
          <i class="fa-solid fa-truck"></i>
          <h3>Logistics</h3>
          <p>Smart, efficient supply chain solutions for Ghanaian businesses — from warehousing and freight coordination to last-mile delivery.</p>
          <a href="/services/" class="learn-more">Learn More →</a>
        </div>
        <div class="service-card">
          <i class="fa-solid fa-industry"></i>
          <h3>Cement Distribution</h3>
          <p>Reliable supply and distribution of cement to construction projects across Greater Accra and beyond, so your site never runs short.</p>
          <a href="/services/" class="learn-more">Learn More →</a>
        </div>
        <div class="service-card">
          <i class="fa-solid fa-handshake"></i>
          <h3>Consultancy</h3>
          <p>Expert advisory across operations, procurement, and supply chain — practical guidance built on deep local market knowledge.</p>
          <a href="/services/" class="learn-more">Learn More →</a>
        </div>
        <div class="service-card">
          <i class="fa-solid fa-chart-line"></i>
          <h3>Business Development</h3>
          <p>We help businesses unlock new opportunities, build partnerships, and grow sustainably in the Ghanaian and West African markets.</p>
          <a href="/services/" class="learn-more">Learn More →</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="why-section">
    <div class="container">
      <div class="section-heading">
        <h2>Why Choose Us</h2>
        <p>The advantages our clients count on every day.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="why-grid">
        <div class="why-tile"><i class="fa-solid fa-shield-halved"></i><h4>Reliability</h4><p>We deliver on our commitments. Every time.</p></div>
        <div class="why-tile"><i class="fa-solid fa-map-location-dot"></i><h4>Local Expertise</h4><p>Deep knowledge of Ghana's ports, roads, and regulations.</p></div>
        <div class="why-tile"><i class="fa-solid fa-hand-holding-dollar"></i><h4>Transparent Pricing</h4><p>No hidden charges. Clear quotes upfront.</p></div>
        <div class="why-tile"><i class="fa-solid fa-route"></i><h4>End-to-End Service</h4><p>From first call to final delivery, we handle it all.</p></div>
      </div>
      <div class="see-all"><a href="/why-us/">See All Reasons →</a></div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="cta-banner">
    <h2>Ready to ship? Let's talk.</h2>
    <p>Contact our team today for a fast, no-obligation quote.</p>
    <a href="/contact/" class="btn btn-dark">Contact Us Now</a>
  </section>

  <section>
    <div class="container">
      <div class="section-heading">
        <h2>In Operation</h2>
        <p>Across the port, the road, and the construction site.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="image-mosaic">
        <div class="tile tall" style="background-image: url('/wp-content/uploads/nuvomaxx/ship-new.png');"><div class="label">Vessel Operations</div></div>
        <div class="tile wide" style="background-image: url('/wp-content/uploads/nuvomaxx/brochure-ship.jpg');"><div class="label">Freight Forwarding</div></div>
        <div class="tile" style="background-image: url('/wp-content/uploads/nuvomaxx/cement-loading-3.webp');"><div class="label">Cement Distribution</div></div>
        <div class="tile accent">Project Management • Logistics • Cement • Consultancy • Business Development</div>
        <div class="tile" style="background-image: url('/wp-content/uploads/nuvomaxx/proj-foreman.jpg');"><div class="label">Project Management</div></div>
        <div class="tile wide" style="background-image: url('/wp-content/uploads/nuvomaxx/team-onsite.jpeg'); background-position: center 30%;"><div class="label">Our Team On-Site</div></div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </section>

  <section>
    <div class="container">
      <div class="section-heading">
        <h2>Trusted by Businesses Across Ghana</h2>
      </div>
      <div class="clients-grid">
        <div class="client-tile"><i class="fa-solid fa-industry"></i><span>Dzata Cement</span></div>
        <div class="client-tile"><i class="fa-solid fa-screwdriver-wrench"></i><span>Installation Specialist</span></div>
        <div class="client-tile"><i class="fa-solid fa-print"></i><span>Agnett Print Media</span></div>
        <div class="client-tile"><i class="fa-solid fa-microchip"></i><span>Jager Tech Electronics</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>
</main>

<footer class="footer">
  <div class="footer-grid">
    <div class="footer-col">
      <img src="/wp-content/uploads/nuvomaxx/nuvo_maxx.png" alt="NUVO MAXX logo" />
      <p class="tagline">Project Management • Logistics • Cement Distribution • Consultancy • Business Development</p>
      <p>A registered Ghanaian company with operations in Burkina Faso, Nigeria, Mali, Niger, Togo, Côte d'Ivoire, and Morocco. Headquartered in Tema, Greater Accra.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="footer-col">
      <h4>Quick Links</h4>
      <ul>
        <li><a href="/">Home</a></li>
        <li><a href="/about/">About Us</a></li>
        <li><a href="/services/">Services</a></li>
        <li><a href="/why-us/">Why Choose Us</a></li>
        <li><a href="/projects/">Projects</a></li>
        <li><a href="/contact/">Contact Us</a></li>
      </ul>
    </div>
    <div class="footer-col">
      <h4>Our Services</h4>
      <ul>
        <li><a href="/services/">Freight Forwarding</a></li>
        <li><a href="/services/">Logistics Services</a></li>
        <li><a href="/services/">Cement Distribution</a></li>
        <li><a href="/services/">Customs Clearance</a></li>
        <li><a href="/services/">Last-Mile Delivery</a></li>
        <li><a href="/services/">Cargo Coordination</a></li>
      </ul>
    </div>
    <div class="footer-col">
      <h4>Contact</h4>
      <div class="contact-line"><i class="fa-solid fa-location-dot"></i><span>Tema Akosombo Road, Tema, Ghana</span></div>
      <div class="contact-line"><i class="fa-solid fa-phone"></i><span>0209157201</span></div>
      <div class="contact-line"><i class="fa-solid fa-phone"></i><span>0547110167</span></div>
      <div class="contact-line"><i class="fa-solid fa-envelope"></i><span>info@nuvomaxx.com</span></div>
      <div class="contact-line"><i class="fa-solid fa-globe"></i><span>www.nuvomaxx.com</span></div>
      <div class="social-row">
        <a href="#" aria-label="Facebook"><i class="fa-brands fa-facebook-f"></i></a>
        <a href="#" aria-label="Instagram"><i class="fa-brands fa-instagram"></i></a>
        <a href="#" aria-label="LinkedIn"><i class="fa-brands fa-linkedin-in"></i></a>
        <a href="#" aria-label="X / Twitter"><i class="fa-brands fa-x-twitter"></i></a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="footer-bottom">© 2024 NUVO MAXX. All Rights Reserved. | Reg. No. BN858050923 | Tema, Ghana</div>
  <div class="ghana-stripe"><span class="ghana-red"></span><span class="ghana-gold"></span><span class="ghana-green"></span></div>
</footer>

<script src="script.js"></script>

item.title: About Us
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
<style>

/* NUVO MAXX — Stylesheet */
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Montserrat:wght@400;600;700;800;900&family=Open+Sans:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap');

* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

:root {
  /* Ghana-inspired palette on a black canvas: red, gold/yellow, green. */
  --primary-bg: #000000;
  --secondary-bg: #0a0a0a;
  --card-bg: #141414;
  --light-grey: #e8e8e8;
  --mid-grey: #8a8a8a;
  --accent: #e8b94a;            /* Ghana gold / yellow */
  --accent-hover: #f0c860;
  --accent-gold: #e8b94a;
  --accent-red: #ce1126;        /* Ghana red */
  --accent-green: #006b3f;      /* Ghana green */
  --text-primary: #ffffff;
  --text-secondary: #c9c9c9;
  --border-subtle: #1f1f1f;
}

html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

body {
  font-family: 'Open Sans', 'Inter', sans-serif;
  background-color: var(--primary-bg);
  color: var(--text-primary);
  line-height: 1.65;
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
  position: relative;
}
body::before {
  content: '';
  position: fixed;
  inset: 0;
  background-image: url('images/nuvo-tree-ghana.png');
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  background-position: center center;
  background-size: min(1100px, 95vw) auto;
  mix-blend-mode: screen;
  opacity: 0.22;
  filter: contrast(1.05) saturate(1.1);
  z-index: 0;
  pointer-events: none;
}
body > * { position: relative; z-index: 1; }



h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 {
  font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
  font-weight: 800;
  line-height: 1.2;
  color: var(--text-primary);
}

a { color: var(--accent); text-decoration: none; transition: all 0.3s ease; }
a:hover { color: var(--accent-hover); }

img { max-width: 100%; display: block; }

/* ===== Navbar ===== */
.navbar {
  position: sticky;
  top: 0;
  z-index: 1000;
  background: var(--primary-bg);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
}
.nav-container {
  max-width: 1400px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 14px 5%;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 24px;
}
.nav-logo img { height: 116px; width: auto; }
.nav-menu {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 28px;
  list-style: none;
}
.nav-menu a {
  color: var(--text-primary);
  font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: 14px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  transition: color 0.3s ease;
}
.nav-menu a:hover { color: var(--accent); }
.nav-menu a.active { color: var(--accent); }

.btn {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 12px 26px;
  background: var(--accent);
  color: #fff;
  font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 14px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  border: 2px solid var(--accent);
  border-radius: 6px;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
}
.btn:hover { background: var(--accent-hover); border-color: var(--accent-hover); color: #fff; }
.btn-outline {
  background: transparent;
  color: #fff;
  border: 2px solid #fff;
}
.btn-outline:hover { background: #fff; color: var(--primary-bg); }
.btn-dark {
  background: var(--primary-bg);
  border-color: var(--primary-bg);
  color: #fff;
}
.btn-dark:hover { background: #000; border-color: #000; color: #fff; }

.hamburger {
  display: none;
  background: none;
  border: none;
  color: #fff;
  font-size: 26px;
  cursor: pointer;
}

/* ===== Hero ===== */
.hero {
  position: relative;
  min-height: 78vh;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  text-align: center;
  padding: 100px 5%;
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
}
.hero::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  background: rgba(10,10,10,0.72);
}
.hero-content { position: relative; z-index: 2; max-width: 900px; }
.hero h1 {
  font-size: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 3.6rem);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 22px;
}
.hero p {
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  margin-bottom: 36px;
  max-width: 720px;
  margin-left: auto;
  margin-right: auto;
}
.hero-buttons { display: flex; gap: 16px; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap; }

.page-hero { min-height: 48vh; }
.page-hero h1 { font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 4vw, 3rem); }

/* ===== Section base ===== */
section { padding: 80px 5%; }
.container { max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; }

.section-heading {
  text-align: center;
  margin-bottom: 56px;
}
.section-heading h2 {
  font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 3vw, 2.4rem);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 2px;
  position: relative;
  padding-bottom: 18px;
  display: inline-block;
}
.section-heading h2::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 0;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  width: 60px;
  height: 3px;
  background: var(--accent);
}
.section-heading p {
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  margin-top: 14px;
  max-width: 680px;
  margin-left: auto;
  margin-right: auto;
}

/* ===== Stats ===== */
.stats {
  background: var(--secondary-bg);
  padding: 50px 5%;
}
.stats-grid {
  max-width: 1280px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  gap: 24px;
}
.stat-tile {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  padding: 32px 22px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  text-align: center;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
}
.stat-tile:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(232,185,74,0.25); }
.stat-tile i { font-size: 2.4rem; color: var(--accent); margin-bottom: 14px; }
.stat-tile h3 { font-size: 1.25rem; margin-bottom: 6px; }
.stat-tile p { color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 0.9rem; }

/* ===== Services Cards ===== */
.services-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 28px;
}
.service-card {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border-top: 3px solid var(--accent);
  padding: 38px 28px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
}
.service-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(232,185,74,0.25); }
.service-card i { font-size: 2.6rem; color: var(--accent); margin-bottom: 18px; }
.service-card h3 { font-size: 1.35rem; margin-bottom: 14px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; }
.service-card p { color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 18px; }
.service-card a.learn-more {
  color: var(--accent);
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  font-size: 13px;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
}

/* ===== Why Tiles ===== */
.why-section { background: var(--secondary-bg); }
.why-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  gap: 24px;
}
.why-tile {
  text-align: center;
  padding: 28px 20px;
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border-radius: 10px;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
}
.why-tile:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(232,185,74,0.25); }
.why-tile i { font-size: 2.2rem; color: var(--accent); margin-bottom: 14px; }
.why-tile h4 { font-size: 1.1rem; margin-bottom: 10px; }
.why-tile p { color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 0.92rem; }
.see-all { text-align: center; margin-top: 36px; }
.see-all a { font-family: 'Montserrat'; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; }

/* ===== CTA Banner ===== */
.cta-banner {
  background: var(--accent);
  text-align: center;
  padding: 60px 5%;
}
.cta-banner h2 {
  font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 3vw, 2.2rem);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
  color: #fff;
}
.cta-banner p { color: #fff; margin-bottom: 26px; font-size: 1.05rem; }

/* ===== Testimonials ===== */
.testimonials-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 28px;
}
.testimonial-card {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  padding: 36px 28px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  position: relative;
  border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
}
.testimonial-card .quote-mark {
  font-size: 3rem;
  color: var(--accent);
  font-family: 'Montserrat';
  line-height: 1;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}
.testimonial-card blockquote { color: #fff; font-style: italic; margin-bottom: 20px; }
.testimonial-author {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 14px;
}
.author-photo {
  width: 54px;
  height: 54px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--secondary-bg);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  color: var(--accent);
  font-size: 1.5rem;
  border: 2px solid var(--accent);
}
.author-info strong { display: block; color: #fff; }
.author-info span { color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 0.88rem; }

/* ===== About Sections ===== */
.two-col {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 56px;
  align-items: center;
}
.two-col h2 {
  font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 3vw, 2.2rem);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 22px;
  position: relative;
  padding-bottom: 16px;
}
.two-col h2::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 0; left: 0;
  width: 60px; height: 3px;
  background: var(--accent);
}
.two-col p { color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 16px; }
.col-image {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border-radius: 10px;
  min-height: 380px;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  text-align: center;
  padding: 24px;
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
}

.mission-section, .vision-section {
  background: var(--secondary-bg);
  text-align: center;
}
.mission-section .container, .vision-section .container { max-width: 900px; }
.mission-section h2, .vision-section h2 {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 2px;
  font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 3vw, 2rem);
  margin-bottom: 20px;
  position: relative;
  padding-bottom: 16px;
  display: inline-block;
}
.mission-section h2::after, .vision-section h2::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 0; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%);
  width: 60px; height: 3px; background: var(--accent);
}
.mission-section p, .vision-section p { color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 1.1rem; }

.values-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  gap: 24px;
}
.value-tile {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  padding: 32px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  border-left: 4px solid var(--accent);
}
.value-tile h4 {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
  color: var(--accent);
}
.value-tile p { color: var(--text-secondary); }

.reg-card {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border-left: 4px solid var(--accent);
  padding: 32px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  max-width: 760px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}
.reg-card h3 {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
  color: var(--accent);
}
.reg-card ul { list-style: none; }
.reg-card li {
  padding: 10px 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  color: var(--text-secondary);
}
.reg-card li:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.reg-card li strong { color: #fff; display: inline-block; min-width: 200px; }

/* ===== Service Detail Sections ===== */
.service-detail { padding: 80px 5%; }
.service-detail:nth-child(even) { background: var(--secondary-bg); }
.service-detail .two-col { gap: 56px; }
.service-detail.reverse .two-col { direction: rtl; }
.service-detail.reverse .two-col > * { direction: ltr; }
.feature-list {
  list-style: none;
  margin-top: 22px;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 10px;
}
.feature-list li {
  color: #fff;
  padding-left: 26px;
  position: relative;
}
.feature-list li::before {
  content: '00c';
  font-family: 'Font Awesome 6 Free';
  font-weight: 900;
  color: var(--accent);
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
}

/* ===== Why Us reasons ===== */
.reasons-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  gap: 28px;
}
.reason-card {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  padding: 32px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
}
.reason-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(232,185,74,0.25); }
.reason-card i { font-size: 2rem; color: var(--accent); margin-bottom: 14px; }
.reason-card h3 {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
}
.reason-card p { color: var(--text-secondary); }

/* ===== Comparison Table ===== */
.comparison-table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border-radius: 10px;
  overflow: hidden;
  margin-top: 30px;
}
.comparison-table th, .comparison-table td {
  padding: 16px 20px;
  text-align: left;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
}
.comparison-table th {
  background: var(--secondary-bg);
  color: #fff;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
}
.comparison-table th.brand { color: var(--accent); }
.comparison-table td { color: var(--text-secondary); }
.comparison-table .check { color: #2ecc71; font-size: 1.2rem; }
.comparison-table .cross { color: #e74c3c; font-size: 1.2rem; }

/* ===== Projects ===== */
.projects-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 28px;
}
.project-card {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border-radius: 10px;
  overflow: hidden;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.project-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(232,185,74,0.25); }
.project-image {
  height: 200px;
  background: var(--secondary-bg);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  padding: 16px;
  text-align: center;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  border-bottom: 3px solid var(--accent);
}
.project-body { padding: 24px; flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
.project-body h3 {
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
}
.project-body p { color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 16px; flex: 1; }
.project-meta { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
.location-tag { color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 0.85rem; }
.location-tag i { color: var(--accent); margin-right: 4px; }
.badge {
  background: var(--accent);
  color: #fff;
  padding: 4px 12px;
  border-radius: 20px;
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
}

.cta-strip {
  background: var(--secondary-bg);
  padding: 60px 5%;
  text-align: center;
}
.cta-strip h3 {
  font-size: clamp(1.3rem, 2.5vw, 1.8rem);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 22px;
}

/* ===== Contact ===== */
.contact-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.4fr;
  gap: 48px;
}
.contact-info { background: var(--card-bg); padding: 36px; border-radius: 10px; }
.contact-info h3 {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 22px;
  color: var(--accent);
}
.contact-item {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  gap: 14px;
  padding: 14px 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
}
.contact-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.contact-item i { color: var(--accent); font-size: 1.2rem; margin-top: 4px; min-width: 22px; }
.contact-item strong { display: block; color: #fff; margin-bottom: 2px; }
.contact-item span, .contact-item a { color: var(--text-secondary); }
.contact-item a:hover { color: var(--accent); }

.contact-form { background: var(--card-bg); padding: 36px; border-radius: 10px; }
.contact-form h3 {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 22px;
  color: var(--accent);
}
.form-group { margin-bottom: 18px; }
.form-group label {
  display: block;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  margin-bottom: 6px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
}
.form-group input,
.form-group select,
.form-group textarea {
  width: 100%;
  padding: 12px 14px;
  background: var(--primary-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  border-radius: 6px;
  color: #fff;
  font-family: inherit;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  transition: border-color 0.3s ease;
}
.form-group input:focus,
.form-group select:focus,
.form-group textarea:focus {
  outline: none;
  border-color: var(--accent);
}
.map-section { padding: 0; }
.map-section iframe { width: 100%; height: 420px; border: none; display: block; }

/* ===== Footer ===== */
.footer {
  background: var(--primary-bg);
  padding: 70px 5% 0;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
}
.footer-grid {
  max-width: 1280px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1.4fr 1fr 1fr 1.2fr;
  gap: 40px;
}
.footer-col h4 {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 18px;
  color: var(--accent);
  font-size: 1rem;
}
.footer-col img { height: 60px; margin-bottom: 18px; }
.footer-col p { color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 14px; font-size: 0.92rem; }
.footer-col ul { list-style: none; }
.footer-col li { margin-bottom: 10px; }
.footer-col a { color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 0.92rem; }
.footer-col a:hover { color: var(--accent); }
.footer-col .contact-line { display: flex; gap: 10px; align-items: flex-start; margin-bottom: 10px; color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 0.92rem; }
.footer-col .contact-line i { color: var(--accent); margin-top: 4px; }
.tagline {
  color: #fff !important;
  font-family: 'Montserrat';
  font-weight: 600;
  font-style: italic;
}
.social-row { display: flex; gap: 12px; margin-top: 14px; }
.social-row a {
  width: 38px; height: 38px;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border-radius: 50%;
  color: #fff;
}
.social-row a:hover { background: var(--accent); color: #fff; }

.footer-bottom {
  max-width: 1280px;
  margin: 50px auto 0;
  padding: 22px 0;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  text-align: center;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  font-size: 0.88rem;
}
.ghana-stripe {
  display: flex;
  width: 100%;
  height: 6px;
}
.ghana-stripe span { flex: 1; height: 100%; }
.ghana-red { background: #ce1126; }
.ghana-gold { background: #fcd116; }
.ghana-green { background: #006b3f; }

/* ===== Responsive ===== */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
  .stats-grid, .why-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
  .services-grid, .testimonials-grid, .projects-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
  .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
}
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  section { padding: 50px 4%; }
  .hamburger { display: block; }
  .nav-menu {
    position: absolute;
    top: 100%; left: 0; right: 0;
    background: var(--primary-bg);
    flex-direction: column;
    padding: 20px;
    gap: 18px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
    display: none;
  }
  .nav-menu.open { display: flex; }
  .nav-menu .btn { width: 100%; text-align: center; }
  .two-col { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 32px; }
  .service-detail.reverse .two-col { direction: ltr; }
  .reasons-grid, .values-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .services-grid, .testimonials-grid, .projects-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .contact-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 28px; }
  .feature-list { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .comparison-table { font-size: 0.85rem; }
  .comparison-table th, .comparison-table td { padding: 10px; }
  .reg-card li strong { display: block; min-width: 0; }
}
@media (max-width: 480px) {
  .stats-grid, .why-grid, .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .hero-buttons { flex-direction: column; align-items: stretch; }
  .hero-buttons .btn { width: 100%; text-align: center; }
}

/* ===== Image-driven sections ===== */
.hero::before {
  background: rgba(0,0,0,0.65);
}
.col-image {
  background-color: var(--card-bg);
  min-height: 420px;
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
}
.col-image span { display: none; }
.project-image {
  height: 220px;
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  background-color: var(--secondary-bg);
}
.project-image span { display: none; }
.cta-banner { background: var(--accent-red); }
.stat-tile i,
.service-card i,
.why-tile i,
.reason-card i { color: #fff; filter: drop-shadow(0 2px 8px rgba(232,185,74,0.4)); }
.service-card { border-top-width: 4px; }
.author-photo { background: var(--accent); color: #fff; border-color: var(--accent); }
.testimonial-card .quote-mark { color: var(--accent-gold); }
.section-heading h2::after,
.two-col h2::after,
.mission-section h2::after,
.vision-section h2::after { background: var(--accent); height: 4px; width: 80px; }

/* Clients / Trusted-by grid */
.clients-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  gap: 24px;
  margin-top: 20px;
}
.client-tile {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 32px 20px;
  text-align: center;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 14px;
  transition: transform .25s ease, box-shadow .25s ease, border-color .25s ease;
}
.client-tile:hover {
  transform: translateY(-4px);
  border-color: var(--accent-green);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(232,185,74,0.18);
}
.client-tile i { font-size: 2rem; color: var(--accent); }
.client-tile span { color: #fff; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1rem; }
@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .clients-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
}

/* ===== Brochure styling overrides ===== */
.hero::before {
  background: rgba(0,0,0,0.72);
}
.cta-banner { background: var(--accent-red); }

/* Icon backgrounds (solid gold/yellow) */
.service-card,
.why-tile,
.reason-card,
.stat-tile {
  border-top: none;
  border-left: none;
}
.service-card { border-top: 4px solid var(--accent-green); }

.service-card i,
.why-tile i,
.reason-card i,
.stat-tile i,
.client-tile i {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  width: 64px;
  height: 64px;
  background: var(--accent);
  color: #fff;
  border-radius: 8px;
  font-size: 1.6rem;
  filter: none;
  margin-bottom: 18px;
}
.client-tile i { width: 56px; height: 56px; font-size: 1.4rem; }

/* Brochure image strip — full-bleed alternating image+text */
.brochure-strip {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 0;
  background: var(--secondary-bg);
}
.brochure-strip .img,
.brochure-strip .copy {
  min-height: 360px;
}
.brochure-strip .img {
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
}
.brochure-strip .copy {
  padding: 60px 6%;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
}
.brochure-strip .copy h2 {
  color: var(--accent);
  font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 3vw, 2.2rem);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 18px;
}
.brochure-strip .copy p { color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 14px; }
.brochure-strip.reverse .img { order: 2; }

/* Image mosaic — brochure-style picture grid */
.image-mosaic {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  grid-auto-rows: 200px;
  gap: 16px;
}
.image-mosaic .tile {
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  border-radius: 8px;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.image-mosaic .tile.wide { grid-column: span 2; }
.image-mosaic .tile.tall { grid-row: span 2; }
.image-mosaic .tile .label {
  position: absolute;
  left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0;
  background: linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.92), rgba(0,0,0,0));
  color: #fff;
  padding: 28px 18px 14px;
  font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
}
.image-mosaic .tile.accent {
  background: var(--accent);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  color: #fff;
  text-align: center;
  padding: 24px;
  font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
  font-weight: 800;
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1.5px;
}

@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .brochure-strip { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .brochure-strip.reverse .img { order: 0; }
  .image-mosaic { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); grid-auto-rows: 160px; }
  .image-mosaic .tile.wide { grid-column: span 2; }
}

/* Ghana stripe → brochure stripe (orange) */
.ghana-stripe { background: var(--accent); height: 6px; }
.ghana-stripe span { display: none; }

/* Footer accent */
.footer-col h4 { color: var(--accent); }


</style>

</header>

<main>
  <!-- IMAGE PLACEHOLDER: Aerial view of Tema Port with Black African workers visible on the dock. -->
  <section class="hero page-hero" style="background-image: url('/wp-content/uploads/nuvomaxx/founder-yard.jpg'); background-position: center 30%;">
    <div class="hero-content">
      <h1>About NUVO MAXX</h1>
      <p>A proudly Ghanaian company built on trust, capability, and a deep commitment to moving businesses forward.</p>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section>
    <div class="container">
      <div class="two-col">
        <div>
          <h2>Our Story</h2>
          <p>NUVO MAXX was established on 13th September 2023 under the Registration of Business Names Act, 1962 (Act 151) of the Republic of Ghana (Reg. No. BN858050923). Founded by David Maxwell, the company was born from a clear need in the African market — businesses required a reliable, knowledgeable, and locally rooted partner to handle the complexity of freight, logistics, and construction material supply.</p>
          <p>Based in Tema along the Akosombo Road, we operate at the heart of Ghana's most active port city. Today our reach extends well beyond Ghana's borders, with active operations in Burkina Faso, Nigeria, Mali, Niger, Togo, Côte d'Ivoire, and Morocco — giving us a strategic advantage in serving importers, exporters, construction firms, and businesses across West and North Africa.</p>
        </div>
        <!-- IMAGE PLACEHOLDER: Black Ghanaian male business owner in a smart casual outfit standing confidently near a freight yard in Tema, Ghana. -->
        <div class="col-image" style="background-image: url('/wp-content/uploads/nuvomaxx/founder.jpg'); background-position: center top;" role="img" aria-label="David Maxwell, founder of NUVO MAXX"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="mission-section">
    <div class="container">
      <h2>Our Mission</h2>
      <p>To deliver efficient, transparent, and reliable freight forwarding, logistics, and distribution services that power the growth of African businesses — connecting local industry to regional and global opportunity.</p>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="vision-section" style="background: var(--primary-bg);">
    <div class="container">
      <h2>Our Vision</h2>
      <p>To become the most trusted logistics and distribution partner across Africa, known for our integrity, our people, and our ability to move any cargo, anywhere, on time.</p>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section>
    <div class="container">
      <div class="section-heading">
        <h2>Our Values</h2>
        <p>The principles that guide every decision we make.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="values-grid">
        <div class="value-tile"><h4>Integrity</h4><p>We operate with full honesty and transparency in every transaction and engagement.</p></div>
        <div class="value-tile"><h4>Reliability</h4><p>Our clients trust us because we consistently deliver — no excuses, no delays.</p></div>
        <div class="value-tile"><h4>Excellence</h4><p>We hold ourselves to the highest standards of service quality in everything we do.</p></div>
        <div class="value-tile"><h4>Community</h4><p>As a proudly Ghanaian business, we invest in the communities and clients that make our work meaningful.</p></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section style="background: var(--secondary-bg);">
    <div class="container">
      <div class="section-heading">
        <h2>Registration Details</h2>
        <p>NUVO MAXX is a registered and compliant Ghanaian business.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="reg-card">
        <h3>Official Business Registration</h3>
        <ul>
          <li><strong>Business Name:</strong> NUVO MAXX</li>
          <li><strong>Registration Number:</strong> BN858050923</li>
          <li><strong>TIN:</strong> P0007419759</li>
          <li><strong>Date of Registration:</strong> 13th September 2023</li>
          <li><strong>Registered Under:</strong> Registration of Business Names Act, 1962 (Act 151), Republic of Ghana</li>
          <li><strong>Location:</strong> Tema, Greater Accra, Ghana</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>
</main>

<footer class="footer">
  <div class="footer-grid">
    <div class="footer-col">
      <img src="/wp-content/uploads/nuvomaxx/nuvo_maxx.png" alt="NUVO MAXX logo" />
      <p class="tagline">Project Management • Logistics • Cement Distribution • Consultancy • Business Development</p>
      <p>A registered Ghanaian company with operations in Burkina Faso, Nigeria, Mali, Niger, Togo, Côte d'Ivoire, and Morocco. Headquartered in Tema, Greater Accra.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="footer-col">
      <h4>Quick Links</h4>
      <ul>
        <li><a href="/">Home</a></li>
        <li><a href="/about/">About Us</a></li>
        <li><a href="/services/">Services</a></li>
        <li><a href="/why-us/">Why Choose Us</a></li>
        <li><a href="/projects/">Projects</a></li>
        <li><a href="/contact/">Contact Us</a></li>
      </ul>
    </div>
    <div class="footer-col">
      <h4>Our Services</h4>
      <ul>
        <li><a href="/services/">Freight Forwarding</a></li>
        <li><a href="/services/">Logistics Services</a></li>
        <li><a href="/services/">Cement Distribution</a></li>
        <li><a href="/services/">Customs Clearance</a></li>
        <li><a href="/services/">Last-Mile Delivery</a></li>
        <li><a href="/services/">Cargo Coordination</a></li>
      </ul>
    </div>
    <div class="footer-col">
      <h4>Contact</h4>
      <div class="contact-line"><i class="fa-solid fa-location-dot"></i><span>Tema Akosombo Road, Tema, Ghana</span></div>
      <div class="contact-line"><i class="fa-solid fa-phone"></i><span>0209157201</span></div>
      <div class="contact-line"><i class="fa-solid fa-phone"></i><span>0547110167</span></div>
      <div class="contact-line"><i class="fa-solid fa-envelope"></i><span>info@nuvomaxx.com</span></div>
      <div class="contact-line"><i class="fa-solid fa-globe"></i><span>www.nuvomaxx.com</span></div>
      <div class="social-row">
        <a href="#" aria-label="Facebook"><i class="fa-brands fa-facebook-f"></i></a>
        <a href="#" aria-label="Instagram"><i class="fa-brands fa-instagram"></i></a>
        <a href="#" aria-label="LinkedIn"><i class="fa-brands fa-linkedin-in"></i></a>
        <a href="#" aria-label="X / Twitter"><i class="fa-brands fa-x-twitter"></i></a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="footer-bottom">© 2024 NUVO MAXX. All Rights Reserved. | Reg. No. BN858050923 | Tema, Ghana</div>
  <div class="ghana-stripe"><span class="ghana-red"></span><span class="ghana-gold"></span><span class="ghana-green"></span></div>
</footer>

<script src="script.js"></script>

item.title: Services
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
<style>

/* NUVO MAXX — Stylesheet */
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Montserrat:wght@400;600;700;800;900&family=Open+Sans:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap');

* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

:root {
  /* Ghana-inspired palette on a black canvas: red, gold/yellow, green. */
  --primary-bg: #000000;
  --secondary-bg: #0a0a0a;
  --card-bg: #141414;
  --light-grey: #e8e8e8;
  --mid-grey: #8a8a8a;
  --accent: #e8b94a;            /* Ghana gold / yellow */
  --accent-hover: #f0c860;
  --accent-gold: #e8b94a;
  --accent-red: #ce1126;        /* Ghana red */
  --accent-green: #006b3f;      /* Ghana green */
  --text-primary: #ffffff;
  --text-secondary: #c9c9c9;
  --border-subtle: #1f1f1f;
}

html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

body {
  font-family: 'Open Sans', 'Inter', sans-serif;
  background-color: var(--primary-bg);
  color: var(--text-primary);
  line-height: 1.65;
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
  position: relative;
}
body::before {
  content: '';
  position: fixed;
  inset: 0;
  background-image: url('images/nuvo-tree-ghana.png');
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  background-position: center center;
  background-size: min(1100px, 95vw) auto;
  mix-blend-mode: screen;
  opacity: 0.22;
  filter: contrast(1.05) saturate(1.1);
  z-index: 0;
  pointer-events: none;
}
body > * { position: relative; z-index: 1; }



h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 {
  font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
  font-weight: 800;
  line-height: 1.2;
  color: var(--text-primary);
}

a { color: var(--accent); text-decoration: none; transition: all 0.3s ease; }
a:hover { color: var(--accent-hover); }

img { max-width: 100%; display: block; }

/* ===== Navbar ===== */
.navbar {
  position: sticky;
  top: 0;
  z-index: 1000;
  background: var(--primary-bg);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
}
.nav-container {
  max-width: 1400px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 14px 5%;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 24px;
}
.nav-logo img { height: 116px; width: auto; }
.nav-menu {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 28px;
  list-style: none;
}
.nav-menu a {
  color: var(--text-primary);
  font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: 14px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  transition: color 0.3s ease;
}
.nav-menu a:hover { color: var(--accent); }
.nav-menu a.active { color: var(--accent); }

.btn {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 12px 26px;
  background: var(--accent);
  color: #fff;
  font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 14px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  border: 2px solid var(--accent);
  border-radius: 6px;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
}
.btn:hover { background: var(--accent-hover); border-color: var(--accent-hover); color: #fff; }
.btn-outline {
  background: transparent;
  color: #fff;
  border: 2px solid #fff;
}
.btn-outline:hover { background: #fff; color: var(--primary-bg); }
.btn-dark {
  background: var(--primary-bg);
  border-color: var(--primary-bg);
  color: #fff;
}
.btn-dark:hover { background: #000; border-color: #000; color: #fff; }

.hamburger {
  display: none;
  background: none;
  border: none;
  color: #fff;
  font-size: 26px;
  cursor: pointer;
}

/* ===== Hero ===== */
.hero {
  position: relative;
  min-height: 78vh;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  text-align: center;
  padding: 100px 5%;
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
}
.hero::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  background: rgba(10,10,10,0.72);
}
.hero-content { position: relative; z-index: 2; max-width: 900px; }
.hero h1 {
  font-size: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 3.6rem);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 22px;
}
.hero p {
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  margin-bottom: 36px;
  max-width: 720px;
  margin-left: auto;
  margin-right: auto;
}
.hero-buttons { display: flex; gap: 16px; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap; }

.page-hero { min-height: 48vh; }
.page-hero h1 { font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 4vw, 3rem); }

/* ===== Section base ===== */
section { padding: 80px 5%; }
.container { max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; }

.section-heading {
  text-align: center;
  margin-bottom: 56px;
}
.section-heading h2 {
  font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 3vw, 2.4rem);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 2px;
  position: relative;
  padding-bottom: 18px;
  display: inline-block;
}
.section-heading h2::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 0;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  width: 60px;
  height: 3px;
  background: var(--accent);
}
.section-heading p {
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  margin-top: 14px;
  max-width: 680px;
  margin-left: auto;
  margin-right: auto;
}

/* ===== Stats ===== */
.stats {
  background: var(--secondary-bg);
  padding: 50px 5%;
}
.stats-grid {
  max-width: 1280px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  gap: 24px;
}
.stat-tile {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  padding: 32px 22px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  text-align: center;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
}
.stat-tile:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(232,185,74,0.25); }
.stat-tile i { font-size: 2.4rem; color: var(--accent); margin-bottom: 14px; }
.stat-tile h3 { font-size: 1.25rem; margin-bottom: 6px; }
.stat-tile p { color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 0.9rem; }

/* ===== Services Cards ===== */
.services-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 28px;
}
.service-card {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border-top: 3px solid var(--accent);
  padding: 38px 28px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
}
.service-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(232,185,74,0.25); }
.service-card i { font-size: 2.6rem; color: var(--accent); margin-bottom: 18px; }
.service-card h3 { font-size: 1.35rem; margin-bottom: 14px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; }
.service-card p { color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 18px; }
.service-card a.learn-more {
  color: var(--accent);
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  font-size: 13px;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
}

/* ===== Why Tiles ===== */
.why-section { background: var(--secondary-bg); }
.why-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  gap: 24px;
}
.why-tile {
  text-align: center;
  padding: 28px 20px;
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border-radius: 10px;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
}
.why-tile:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(232,185,74,0.25); }
.why-tile i { font-size: 2.2rem; color: var(--accent); margin-bottom: 14px; }
.why-tile h4 { font-size: 1.1rem; margin-bottom: 10px; }
.why-tile p { color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 0.92rem; }
.see-all { text-align: center; margin-top: 36px; }
.see-all a { font-family: 'Montserrat'; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; }

/* ===== CTA Banner ===== */
.cta-banner {
  background: var(--accent);
  text-align: center;
  padding: 60px 5%;
}
.cta-banner h2 {
  font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 3vw, 2.2rem);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
  color: #fff;
}
.cta-banner p { color: #fff; margin-bottom: 26px; font-size: 1.05rem; }

/* ===== Testimonials ===== */
.testimonials-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 28px;
}
.testimonial-card {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  padding: 36px 28px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  position: relative;
  border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
}
.testimonial-card .quote-mark {
  font-size: 3rem;
  color: var(--accent);
  font-family: 'Montserrat';
  line-height: 1;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}
.testimonial-card blockquote { color: #fff; font-style: italic; margin-bottom: 20px; }
.testimonial-author {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 14px;
}
.author-photo {
  width: 54px;
  height: 54px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--secondary-bg);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  color: var(--accent);
  font-size: 1.5rem;
  border: 2px solid var(--accent);
}
.author-info strong { display: block; color: #fff; }
.author-info span { color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 0.88rem; }

/* ===== About Sections ===== */
.two-col {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 56px;
  align-items: center;
}
.two-col h2 {
  font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 3vw, 2.2rem);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 22px;
  position: relative;
  padding-bottom: 16px;
}
.two-col h2::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 0; left: 0;
  width: 60px; height: 3px;
  background: var(--accent);
}
.two-col p { color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 16px; }
.col-image {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border-radius: 10px;
  min-height: 380px;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  text-align: center;
  padding: 24px;
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
}

.mission-section, .vision-section {
  background: var(--secondary-bg);
  text-align: center;
}
.mission-section .container, .vision-section .container { max-width: 900px; }
.mission-section h2, .vision-section h2 {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 2px;
  font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 3vw, 2rem);
  margin-bottom: 20px;
  position: relative;
  padding-bottom: 16px;
  display: inline-block;
}
.mission-section h2::after, .vision-section h2::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 0; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%);
  width: 60px; height: 3px; background: var(--accent);
}
.mission-section p, .vision-section p { color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 1.1rem; }

.values-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  gap: 24px;
}
.value-tile {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  padding: 32px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  border-left: 4px solid var(--accent);
}
.value-tile h4 {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
  color: var(--accent);
}
.value-tile p { color: var(--text-secondary); }

.reg-card {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border-left: 4px solid var(--accent);
  padding: 32px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  max-width: 760px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}
.reg-card h3 {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
  color: var(--accent);
}
.reg-card ul { list-style: none; }
.reg-card li {
  padding: 10px 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  color: var(--text-secondary);
}
.reg-card li:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.reg-card li strong { color: #fff; display: inline-block; min-width: 200px; }

/* ===== Service Detail Sections ===== */
.service-detail { padding: 80px 5%; }
.service-detail:nth-child(even) { background: var(--secondary-bg); }
.service-detail .two-col { gap: 56px; }
.service-detail.reverse .two-col { direction: rtl; }
.service-detail.reverse .two-col > * { direction: ltr; }
.feature-list {
  list-style: none;
  margin-top: 22px;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 10px;
}
.feature-list li {
  color: #fff;
  padding-left: 26px;
  position: relative;
}
.feature-list li::before {
  content: '00c';
  font-family: 'Font Awesome 6 Free';
  font-weight: 900;
  color: var(--accent);
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
}

/* ===== Why Us reasons ===== */
.reasons-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  gap: 28px;
}
.reason-card {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  padding: 32px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
}
.reason-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(232,185,74,0.25); }
.reason-card i { font-size: 2rem; color: var(--accent); margin-bottom: 14px; }
.reason-card h3 {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
}
.reason-card p { color: var(--text-secondary); }

/* ===== Comparison Table ===== */
.comparison-table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border-radius: 10px;
  overflow: hidden;
  margin-top: 30px;
}
.comparison-table th, .comparison-table td {
  padding: 16px 20px;
  text-align: left;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
}
.comparison-table th {
  background: var(--secondary-bg);
  color: #fff;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
}
.comparison-table th.brand { color: var(--accent); }
.comparison-table td { color: var(--text-secondary); }
.comparison-table .check { color: #2ecc71; font-size: 1.2rem; }
.comparison-table .cross { color: #e74c3c; font-size: 1.2rem; }

/* ===== Projects ===== */
.projects-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 28px;
}
.project-card {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border-radius: 10px;
  overflow: hidden;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
