}
.project-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(232,185,74,0.25); }
.project-image {
  height: 200px;
  background: var(--secondary-bg);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  padding: 16px;
  text-align: center;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  border-bottom: 3px solid var(--accent);
}
.project-body { padding: 24px; flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
.project-body h3 {
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
}
.project-body p { color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 16px; flex: 1; }
.project-meta { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
.location-tag { color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 0.85rem; }
.location-tag i { color: var(--accent); margin-right: 4px; }
.badge {
  background: var(--accent);
  color: #fff;
  padding: 4px 12px;
  border-radius: 20px;
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
}

.cta-strip {
  background: var(--secondary-bg);
  padding: 60px 5%;
  text-align: center;
}
.cta-strip h3 {
  font-size: clamp(1.3rem, 2.5vw, 1.8rem);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 22px;
}

/* ===== Contact ===== */
.contact-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.4fr;
  gap: 48px;
}
.contact-info { background: var(--card-bg); padding: 36px; border-radius: 10px; }
.contact-info h3 {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 22px;
  color: var(--accent);
}
.contact-item {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  gap: 14px;
  padding: 14px 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
}
.contact-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.contact-item i { color: var(--accent); font-size: 1.2rem; margin-top: 4px; min-width: 22px; }
.contact-item strong { display: block; color: #fff; margin-bottom: 2px; }
.contact-item span, .contact-item a { color: var(--text-secondary); }
.contact-item a:hover { color: var(--accent); }

.contact-form { background: var(--card-bg); padding: 36px; border-radius: 10px; }
.contact-form h3 {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 22px;
  color: var(--accent);
}
.form-group { margin-bottom: 18px; }
.form-group label {
  display: block;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  margin-bottom: 6px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
}
.form-group input,
.form-group select,
.form-group textarea {
  width: 100%;
  padding: 12px 14px;
  background: var(--primary-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  border-radius: 6px;
  color: #fff;
  font-family: inherit;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  transition: border-color 0.3s ease;
}
.form-group input:focus,
.form-group select:focus,
.form-group textarea:focus {
  outline: none;
  border-color: var(--accent);
}
.map-section { padding: 0; }
.map-section iframe { width: 100%; height: 420px; border: none; display: block; }

/* ===== Footer ===== */
.footer {
  background: var(--primary-bg);
  padding: 70px 5% 0;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
}
.footer-grid {
  max-width: 1280px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1.4fr 1fr 1fr 1.2fr;
  gap: 40px;
}
.footer-col h4 {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 18px;
  color: var(--accent);
  font-size: 1rem;
}
.footer-col img { height: 60px; margin-bottom: 18px; }
.footer-col p { color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 14px; font-size: 0.92rem; }
.footer-col ul { list-style: none; }
.footer-col li { margin-bottom: 10px; }
.footer-col a { color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 0.92rem; }
.footer-col a:hover { color: var(--accent); }
.footer-col .contact-line { display: flex; gap: 10px; align-items: flex-start; margin-bottom: 10px; color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 0.92rem; }
.footer-col .contact-line i { color: var(--accent); margin-top: 4px; }
.tagline {
  color: #fff !important;
  font-family: 'Montserrat';
  font-weight: 600;
  font-style: italic;
}
.social-row { display: flex; gap: 12px; margin-top: 14px; }
.social-row a {
  width: 38px; height: 38px;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border-radius: 50%;
  color: #fff;
}
.social-row a:hover { background: var(--accent); color: #fff; }

.footer-bottom {
  max-width: 1280px;
  margin: 50px auto 0;
  padding: 22px 0;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  text-align: center;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  font-size: 0.88rem;
}
.ghana-stripe {
  display: flex;
  width: 100%;
  height: 6px;
}
.ghana-stripe span { flex: 1; height: 100%; }
.ghana-red { background: #ce1126; }
.ghana-gold { background: #fcd116; }
.ghana-green { background: #006b3f; }

/* ===== Responsive ===== */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
  .stats-grid, .why-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
  .services-grid, .testimonials-grid, .projects-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
  .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
}
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  section { padding: 50px 4%; }
  .hamburger { display: block; }
  .nav-menu {
    position: absolute;
    top: 100%; left: 0; right: 0;
    background: var(--primary-bg);
    flex-direction: column;
    padding: 20px;
    gap: 18px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
    display: none;
  }
  .nav-menu.open { display: flex; }
  .nav-menu .btn { width: 100%; text-align: center; }
  .two-col { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 32px; }
  .service-detail.reverse .two-col { direction: ltr; }
  .reasons-grid, .values-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .services-grid, .testimonials-grid, .projects-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .contact-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 28px; }
  .feature-list { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .comparison-table { font-size: 0.85rem; }
  .comparison-table th, .comparison-table td { padding: 10px; }
  .reg-card li strong { display: block; min-width: 0; }
}
@media (max-width: 480px) {
  .stats-grid, .why-grid, .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .hero-buttons { flex-direction: column; align-items: stretch; }
  .hero-buttons .btn { width: 100%; text-align: center; }
}

/* ===== Image-driven sections ===== */
.hero::before {
  background: rgba(0,0,0,0.65);
}
.col-image {
  background-color: var(--card-bg);
  min-height: 420px;
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
}
.col-image span { display: none; }
.project-image {
  height: 220px;
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  background-color: var(--secondary-bg);
}
.project-image span { display: none; }
.cta-banner { background: var(--accent-red); }
.stat-tile i,
.service-card i,
.why-tile i,
.reason-card i { color: #fff; filter: drop-shadow(0 2px 8px rgba(232,185,74,0.4)); }
.service-card { border-top-width: 4px; }
.author-photo { background: var(--accent); color: #fff; border-color: var(--accent); }
.testimonial-card .quote-mark { color: var(--accent-gold); }
.section-heading h2::after,
.two-col h2::after,
.mission-section h2::after,
.vision-section h2::after { background: var(--accent); height: 4px; width: 80px; }

/* Clients / Trusted-by grid */
.clients-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  gap: 24px;
  margin-top: 20px;
}
.client-tile {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 32px 20px;
  text-align: center;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 14px;
  transition: transform .25s ease, box-shadow .25s ease, border-color .25s ease;
}
.client-tile:hover {
  transform: translateY(-4px);
  border-color: var(--accent-green);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(232,185,74,0.18);
}
.client-tile i { font-size: 2rem; color: var(--accent); }
.client-tile span { color: #fff; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1rem; }
@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .clients-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
}

/* ===== Brochure styling overrides ===== */
.hero::before {
  background: rgba(0,0,0,0.72);
}
.cta-banner { background: var(--accent-red); }

/* Icon backgrounds (solid gold/yellow) */
.service-card,
.why-tile,
.reason-card,
.stat-tile {
  border-top: none;
  border-left: none;
}
.service-card { border-top: 4px solid var(--accent-green); }

.service-card i,
.why-tile i,
.reason-card i,
.stat-tile i,
.client-tile i {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  width: 64px;
  height: 64px;
  background: var(--accent);
  color: #fff;
  border-radius: 8px;
  font-size: 1.6rem;
  filter: none;
  margin-bottom: 18px;
}
.client-tile i { width: 56px; height: 56px; font-size: 1.4rem; }

/* Brochure image strip — full-bleed alternating image+text */
.brochure-strip {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 0;
  background: var(--secondary-bg);
}
.brochure-strip .img,
.brochure-strip .copy {
  min-height: 360px;
}
.brochure-strip .img {
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
}
.brochure-strip .copy {
  padding: 60px 6%;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
}
.brochure-strip .copy h2 {
  color: var(--accent);
  font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 3vw, 2.2rem);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 18px;
}
.brochure-strip .copy p { color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 14px; }
.brochure-strip.reverse .img { order: 2; }

/* Image mosaic — brochure-style picture grid */
.image-mosaic {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  grid-auto-rows: 200px;
  gap: 16px;
}
.image-mosaic .tile {
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  border-radius: 8px;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.image-mosaic .tile.wide { grid-column: span 2; }
.image-mosaic .tile.tall { grid-row: span 2; }
.image-mosaic .tile .label {
  position: absolute;
  left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0;
  background: linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.92), rgba(0,0,0,0));
  color: #fff;
  padding: 28px 18px 14px;
  font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
}
.image-mosaic .tile.accent {
  background: var(--accent);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  color: #fff;
  text-align: center;
  padding: 24px;
  font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
  font-weight: 800;
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1.5px;
}

@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .brochure-strip { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .brochure-strip.reverse .img { order: 0; }
  .image-mosaic { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); grid-auto-rows: 160px; }
  .image-mosaic .tile.wide { grid-column: span 2; }
}

/* Ghana stripe → brochure stripe (orange) */
.ghana-stripe { background: var(--accent); height: 6px; }
.ghana-stripe span { display: none; }

/* Footer accent */
.footer-col h4 { color: var(--accent); }


</style>


<header class="navbar">
  <div class="nav-container">
    <a href="/" class="nav-logo"><img src="/wp-content/uploads/nuvomaxx/nuvo_maxx.png" alt="NUVO MAXX logo" /></a>
    <button class="hamburger" aria-label="Toggle menu"><i class="fa-solid fa-bars"></i></button>
    <ul class="nav-menu">
      <li><a href="/">Home</a></li>
      <li><a href="/about/">About Us</a></li>
      <li><a href="/services/" class="active">Services</a></li>
      <li><a href="/why-us/">Why Us</a></li>
      <li><a href="/projects/">Projects</a></li>
      <li><a href="/contact/">Contact Us</a></li>
      <li><a href="/contact/" class="btn">Get a Quote</a></li>
    </ul>
  </div>
</header>

<main>
  <!-- IMAGE PLACEHOLDER: Black African freight workers inspecting cargo documentation at a Ghanaian warehouse. -->
  <section class="hero page-hero" style="background-image: url('/wp-content/uploads/nuvomaxx/brochure-port-workers.png');">
    <div class="hero-content">
      <h1>Our Services</h1>
      <p>Comprehensive freight, logistics, and distribution solutions built for businesses across West and North Africa.</p>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="service-detail">
    <div class="container">
      <div class="two-col">
        <div>
          <h2>Freight Forwarding</h2>
          <p>Navigating international freight can be complex — customs documentation, import duties, carrier coordination, and regulatory compliance all require expertise. At NUVO MAXX, our freight forwarding service is designed to take that burden off you completely. We manage the full import and export process, liaising with shipping lines, airlines, customs authorities, and inland transporters to ensure your cargo moves efficiently from origin to destination. Whether you are bringing goods into Ghana, exporting across West Africa, or moving cargo into or out of Morocco and North Africa, we provide end-to-end support with full visibility at every stage.</p>
          <ul class="feature-list">
            <li>Air Freight</li>
            <li>Sea Freight</li>
            <li>Customs Clearance</li>
            <li>Documentation Management</li>
            <li>Port Handling</li>
            <li>Cargo Tracking</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
        <!-- IMAGE PLACEHOLDER: Black Ghanaian male freight agent in a high-visibility vest reviewing shipping documents at the Tema container port. -->
        <div class="col-image" style="background-image: url('/wp-content/uploads/nuvomaxx/freight-agent.jpg');" role="img" aria-label="Black Ghanaian freight agent at Tema container port"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="service-detail reverse">
    <div class="container">
      <div class="two-col">
        <div>
          <h2>Logistics Services</h2>
          <p>Efficient logistics is the backbone of any successful business operation. NUVO MAXX offers a comprehensive range of logistics services designed to streamline your supply chain and reduce operational costs. We work with businesses from the Greater Accra region to Lagos, Lomé, Abidjan, Ouagadougou, Bamako, Niamey, and beyond — coordinating transportation, warehousing, and delivery scheduling to keep your business running without interruption. Our team understands the local road networks, seasonal challenges, and port dynamics that affect logistics across the region, and we plan around them so you do not have to.</p>
          <ul class="feature-list">
            <li>Road Transportation</li>
            <li>Supply Chain Coordination</li>
            <li>Last-Mile Delivery</li>
            <li>Warehousing Support</li>
            <li>Fleet Dispatching</li>
            <li>Scheduled Distribution</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
        <!-- IMAGE PLACEHOLDER: Team of Black Ghanaian logistics workers coordinating deliveries at a busy distribution warehouse in Tema, Ghana. -->
        <div class="col-image" style="background-image: url('/wp-content/uploads/nuvomaxx/logistics-team.jpg');" role="img" aria-label="Black Ghanaian logistics team at a Tema warehouse"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="service-detail">
    <div class="container">
      <div class="two-col">
        <div>
          <h2>Cement Distribution</h2>
          <p>Construction projects across Ghana, West Africa, and North Africa depend on a steady, reliable supply of cement and construction materials. Delays in material supply cause costly project overruns. NUVO MAXX bridges the gap between cement suppliers and construction sites, providing a dependable distribution service that ensures your materials arrive when you need them. We serve contractors, building developers, hardware traders, and government project sites — offering bulk and standard delivery options with a network capable of handling projects at scale.</p>
          <ul class="feature-list">
            <li>Bulk Cement Supply</li>
            <li>Site Delivery</li>
            <li>Construction Project Support</li>
            <li>Reliable Scheduling</li>
            <li>Coverage Across Greater Accra</li>
            <li>Competitive Pricing</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
        <!-- IMAGE PLACEHOLDER: Black Ghanaian construction workers receiving bags of cement at a building site in Accra, with a NUVO MAXX delivery truck visible in the background. -->
        <div class="col-image" style="background-image: url('/wp-content/uploads/nuvomaxx/cement-loading-2.jpg');" role="img" aria-label="NUVO MAXX cement distribution — Dzata cement bags loaded at site"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="service-detail reverse">
    <div class="container">
      <div class="two-col">
        <div>
          <h2>Project Management</h2>
          <p>Complex projects need a steady hand from kickoff to handover. NUVO MAXX provides end-to-end project management — scoping, planning, scheduling, vendor coordination, on-site supervision, and reporting — so your initiatives stay on budget and on time. We've supported construction, freight, and distribution projects across Ghana and neighbouring markets, bringing together the right people, equipment, and timelines to deliver predictable results.</p>
          <ul class="feature-list">
            <li>Scope & Timeline Planning</li>
            <li>Vendor & Contractor Coordination</li>
            <li>On-Site Supervision</li>
            <li>Budget Tracking</li>
            <li>Risk & Compliance Management</li>
            <li>Progress Reporting</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
        <div class="col-image" style="background-image: url('/wp-content/uploads/nuvomaxx/stevedores-team.png');" role="img" aria-label="NUVO MAXX project team on a Ghanaian port site"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="service-detail">
    <div class="container">
      <div class="two-col">
        <div>
          <h2>Consultancy</h2>
          <p>Drawing on deep regional market knowledge, NUVO MAXX offers practical consultancy across operations, procurement, freight strategy, and supply chain optimisation. We help businesses entering or scaling within Ghana, West Africa, and North Africa understand the regulatory environment, identify the right partners, and design operating models that actually work on the ground in Tema, Accra, Lagos, Lomé, Abidjan, and beyond.</p>
          <ul class="feature-list">
            <li>Operations & Supply Chain Advisory</li>
            <li>Procurement Strategy</li>
            <li>Market Entry Support</li>
            <li>Regulatory & Compliance Guidance</li>
            <li>Cost & Process Optimisation</li>
            <li>Vendor Due Diligence</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
        <div class="col-image" style="background-image: url('/wp-content/uploads/nuvomaxx/ceo-with-team.jpeg');" role="img" aria-label="NUVO MAXX leadership consulting with vessel partners"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="service-detail reverse">
    <div class="container">
      <div class="two-col">
        <div>
          <h2>Business Development</h2>
          <p>We help organisations unlock new opportunities across Ghana, West Africa, and North Africa. From partnership sourcing and lead generation to commercial structuring and account growth, our business development service is built on relationships, sector insight, and a results-first mindset — opening the doors that move your business forward.</p>
          <ul class="feature-list">
            <li>Partnership & Network Building</li>
            <li>Lead Generation & Pipeline</li>
            <li>Commercial Structuring</li>
            <li>Account Growth Programs</li>
            <li>Market Insight & Positioning</li>
            <li>Cross-Sector Introductions</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
        <div class="col-image" style="background-image: url('/wp-content/uploads/nuvomaxx/onsite-delivery.jpg');" role="img" aria-label="NUVO MAXX business development — construction site in Accra"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>



  <section class="cta-banner">
    <h2>Need a custom logistics solution? Let's build it together.</h2>
    <p>Tell us about your project and we'll put together a tailored plan.</p>
    <a href="/contact/" class="btn btn-dark">Request a Quote</a>
  </section>
</main>

<footer class="footer">
  <div class="footer-grid">
    <div class="footer-col">
      <img src="/wp-content/uploads/nuvomaxx/nuvo_maxx.png" alt="NUVO MAXX logo" />
      <p class="tagline">Project Management • Logistics • Cement Distribution • Consultancy • Business Development</p>
      <p>A registered Ghanaian company with operations in Burkina Faso, Nigeria, Mali, Niger, Togo, Côte d'Ivoire, and Morocco. Headquartered in Tema, Greater Accra.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="footer-col">
      <h4>Quick Links</h4>
      <ul>
        <li><a href="/">Home</a></li>
        <li><a href="/about/">About Us</a></li>
        <li><a href="/services/">Services</a></li>
        <li><a href="/why-us/">Why Choose Us</a></li>
        <li><a href="/projects/">Projects</a></li>
        <li><a href="/contact/">Contact Us</a></li>
      </ul>
    </div>
    <div class="footer-col">
      <h4>Our Services</h4>
      <ul>
        <li><a href="/services/">Freight Forwarding</a></li>
        <li><a href="/services/">Logistics Services</a></li>
        <li><a href="/services/">Cement Distribution</a></li>
        <li><a href="/services/">Customs Clearance</a></li>
        <li><a href="/services/">Last-Mile Delivery</a></li>
        <li><a href="/services/">Cargo Coordination</a></li>
      </ul>
    </div>
    <div class="footer-col">
      <h4>Contact</h4>
      <div class="contact-line"><i class="fa-solid fa-location-dot"></i><span>Tema Akosombo Road, Tema, Ghana</span></div>
      <div class="contact-line"><i class="fa-solid fa-phone"></i><span>0209157201</span></div>
      <div class="contact-line"><i class="fa-solid fa-phone"></i><span>0547110167</span></div>
      <div class="contact-line"><i class="fa-solid fa-envelope"></i><span>info@nuvomaxx.com</span></div>
      <div class="contact-line"><i class="fa-solid fa-globe"></i><span>www.nuvomaxx.com</span></div>
      <div class="social-row">
        <a href="#" aria-label="Facebook"><i class="fa-brands fa-facebook-f"></i></a>
        <a href="#" aria-label="Instagram"><i class="fa-brands fa-instagram"></i></a>
        <a href="#" aria-label="LinkedIn"><i class="fa-brands fa-linkedin-in"></i></a>
        <a href="#" aria-label="X / Twitter"><i class="fa-brands fa-x-twitter"></i></a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="footer-bottom">© 2024 NUVO MAXX. All Rights Reserved. | Reg. No. BN858050923 | Tema, Ghana</div>
  <div class="ghana-stripe"><span class="ghana-red"></span><span class="ghana-gold"></span><span class="ghana-green"></span></div>
</footer>

<script src="script.js"></script>

item.title: Why Us
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
<style>

/* NUVO MAXX — Stylesheet */
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Montserrat:wght@400;600;700;800;900&family=Open+Sans:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap');

* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

:root {
  /* Ghana-inspired palette on a black canvas: red, gold/yellow, green. */
  --primary-bg: #000000;
  --secondary-bg: #0a0a0a;
  --card-bg: #141414;
  --light-grey: #e8e8e8;
  --mid-grey: #8a8a8a;
  --accent: #e8b94a;            /* Ghana gold / yellow */
  --accent-hover: #f0c860;
  --accent-gold: #e8b94a;
  --accent-red: #ce1126;        /* Ghana red */
  --accent-green: #006b3f;      /* Ghana green */
  --text-primary: #ffffff;
  --text-secondary: #c9c9c9;
  --border-subtle: #1f1f1f;
}

html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

body {
  font-family: 'Open Sans', 'Inter', sans-serif;
  background-color: var(--primary-bg);
  color: var(--text-primary);
  line-height: 1.65;
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
  position: relative;
}
body::before {
  content: '';
  position: fixed;
  inset: 0;
  background-image: url('images/nuvo-tree-ghana.png');
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  background-position: center center;
  background-size: min(1100px, 95vw) auto;
  mix-blend-mode: screen;
  opacity: 0.22;
  filter: contrast(1.05) saturate(1.1);
  z-index: 0;
  pointer-events: none;
}
body > * { position: relative; z-index: 1; }



h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 {
  font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
  font-weight: 800;
  line-height: 1.2;
  color: var(--text-primary);
}

a { color: var(--accent); text-decoration: none; transition: all 0.3s ease; }
a:hover { color: var(--accent-hover); }

img { max-width: 100%; display: block; }

/* ===== Navbar ===== */
.navbar {
  position: sticky;
  top: 0;
  z-index: 1000;
  background: var(--primary-bg);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
}
.nav-container {
  max-width: 1400px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 14px 5%;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 24px;
}
.nav-logo img { height: 116px; width: auto; }
.nav-menu {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 28px;
  list-style: none;
}
.nav-menu a {
  color: var(--text-primary);
  font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: 14px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  transition: color 0.3s ease;
}
.nav-menu a:hover { color: var(--accent); }
.nav-menu a.active { color: var(--accent); }

.btn {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 12px 26px;
  background: var(--accent);
  color: #fff;
  font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 14px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  border: 2px solid var(--accent);
  border-radius: 6px;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
}
.btn:hover { background: var(--accent-hover); border-color: var(--accent-hover); color: #fff; }
.btn-outline {
  background: transparent;
  color: #fff;
  border: 2px solid #fff;
}
.btn-outline:hover { background: #fff; color: var(--primary-bg); }
.btn-dark {
  background: var(--primary-bg);
  border-color: var(--primary-bg);
  color: #fff;
}
.btn-dark:hover { background: #000; border-color: #000; color: #fff; }

.hamburger {
  display: none;
  background: none;
  border: none;
  color: #fff;
  font-size: 26px;
  cursor: pointer;
}

/* ===== Hero ===== */
.hero {
  position: relative;
  min-height: 78vh;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  text-align: center;
  padding: 100px 5%;
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
}
.hero::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  background: rgba(10,10,10,0.72);
}
.hero-content { position: relative; z-index: 2; max-width: 900px; }
.hero h1 {
  font-size: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 3.6rem);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 22px;
}
.hero p {
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  margin-bottom: 36px;
  max-width: 720px;
  margin-left: auto;
  margin-right: auto;
}
.hero-buttons { display: flex; gap: 16px; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap; }

.page-hero { min-height: 48vh; }
.page-hero h1 { font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 4vw, 3rem); }

/* ===== Section base ===== */
section { padding: 80px 5%; }
.container { max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; }

.section-heading {
  text-align: center;
  margin-bottom: 56px;
}
.section-heading h2 {
  font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 3vw, 2.4rem);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 2px;
  position: relative;
  padding-bottom: 18px;
  display: inline-block;
}
.section-heading h2::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 0;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  width: 60px;
  height: 3px;
  background: var(--accent);
}
.section-heading p {
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  margin-top: 14px;
  max-width: 680px;
  margin-left: auto;
  margin-right: auto;
}

/* ===== Stats ===== */
.stats {
  background: var(--secondary-bg);
  padding: 50px 5%;
}
.stats-grid {
  max-width: 1280px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  gap: 24px;
}
.stat-tile {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  padding: 32px 22px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  text-align: center;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
}
.stat-tile:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(232,185,74,0.25); }
.stat-tile i { font-size: 2.4rem; color: var(--accent); margin-bottom: 14px; }
.stat-tile h3 { font-size: 1.25rem; margin-bottom: 6px; }
.stat-tile p { color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 0.9rem; }

/* ===== Services Cards ===== */
.services-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 28px;
}
.service-card {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border-top: 3px solid var(--accent);
  padding: 38px 28px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
}
.service-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(232,185,74,0.25); }
.service-card i { font-size: 2.6rem; color: var(--accent); margin-bottom: 18px; }
.service-card h3 { font-size: 1.35rem; margin-bottom: 14px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; }
.service-card p { color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 18px; }
.service-card a.learn-more {
  color: var(--accent);
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  font-size: 13px;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
}

/* ===== Why Tiles ===== */
.why-section { background: var(--secondary-bg); }
.why-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  gap: 24px;
}
.why-tile {
  text-align: center;
  padding: 28px 20px;
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border-radius: 10px;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
}
.why-tile:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(232,185,74,0.25); }
.why-tile i { font-size: 2.2rem; color: var(--accent); margin-bottom: 14px; }
.why-tile h4 { font-size: 1.1rem; margin-bottom: 10px; }
.why-tile p { color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 0.92rem; }
.see-all { text-align: center; margin-top: 36px; }
.see-all a { font-family: 'Montserrat'; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; }

/* ===== CTA Banner ===== */
.cta-banner {
  background: var(--accent);
  text-align: center;
  padding: 60px 5%;
}
.cta-banner h2 {
  font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 3vw, 2.2rem);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
  color: #fff;
}
.cta-banner p { color: #fff; margin-bottom: 26px; font-size: 1.05rem; }

/* ===== Testimonials ===== */
.testimonials-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 28px;
}
.testimonial-card {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  padding: 36px 28px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  position: relative;
  border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
}
.testimonial-card .quote-mark {
  font-size: 3rem;
  color: var(--accent);
  font-family: 'Montserrat';
  line-height: 1;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}
.testimonial-card blockquote { color: #fff; font-style: italic; margin-bottom: 20px; }
.testimonial-author {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 14px;
}
.author-photo {
  width: 54px;
  height: 54px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--secondary-bg);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  color: var(--accent);
  font-size: 1.5rem;
  border: 2px solid var(--accent);
}
.author-info strong { display: block; color: #fff; }
.author-info span { color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 0.88rem; }

/* ===== About Sections ===== */
.two-col {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 56px;
  align-items: center;
}
.two-col h2 {
  font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 3vw, 2.2rem);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 22px;
  position: relative;
  padding-bottom: 16px;
}
.two-col h2::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 0; left: 0;
  width: 60px; height: 3px;
  background: var(--accent);
}
.two-col p { color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 16px; }
.col-image {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border-radius: 10px;
  min-height: 380px;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  text-align: center;
  padding: 24px;
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
}

.mission-section, .vision-section {
  background: var(--secondary-bg);
  text-align: center;
}
.mission-section .container, .vision-section .container { max-width: 900px; }
.mission-section h2, .vision-section h2 {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 2px;
  font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 3vw, 2rem);
  margin-bottom: 20px;
  position: relative;
  padding-bottom: 16px;
  display: inline-block;
}
.mission-section h2::after, .vision-section h2::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 0; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%);
  width: 60px; height: 3px; background: var(--accent);
}
.mission-section p, .vision-section p { color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 1.1rem; }

.values-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  gap: 24px;
}
.value-tile {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  padding: 32px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  border-left: 4px solid var(--accent);
}
.value-tile h4 {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
  color: var(--accent);
}
.value-tile p { color: var(--text-secondary); }

.reg-card {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border-left: 4px solid var(--accent);
  padding: 32px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  max-width: 760px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}
.reg-card h3 {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
  color: var(--accent);
}
.reg-card ul { list-style: none; }
.reg-card li {
  padding: 10px 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  color: var(--text-secondary);
}
.reg-card li:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.reg-card li strong { color: #fff; display: inline-block; min-width: 200px; }

/* ===== Service Detail Sections ===== */
.service-detail { padding: 80px 5%; }
.service-detail:nth-child(even) { background: var(--secondary-bg); }
.service-detail .two-col { gap: 56px; }
.service-detail.reverse .two-col { direction: rtl; }
.service-detail.reverse .two-col > * { direction: ltr; }
.feature-list {
  list-style: none;
  margin-top: 22px;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 10px;
}
.feature-list li {
  color: #fff;
  padding-left: 26px;
  position: relative;
}
.feature-list li::before {
  content: '00c';
  font-family: 'Font Awesome 6 Free';
  font-weight: 900;
  color: var(--accent);
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
}

/* ===== Why Us reasons ===== */
.reasons-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  gap: 28px;
}
.reason-card {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  padding: 32px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
}
.reason-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(232,185,74,0.25); }
.reason-card i { font-size: 2rem; color: var(--accent); margin-bottom: 14px; }
.reason-card h3 {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
}
.reason-card p { color: var(--text-secondary); }

/* ===== Comparison Table ===== */
.comparison-table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border-radius: 10px;
  overflow: hidden;
  margin-top: 30px;
}
.comparison-table th, .comparison-table td {
  padding: 16px 20px;
  text-align: left;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
}
.comparison-table th {
  background: var(--secondary-bg);
  color: #fff;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
}
.comparison-table th.brand { color: var(--accent); }
.comparison-table td { color: var(--text-secondary); }
.comparison-table .check { color: #2ecc71; font-size: 1.2rem; }
.comparison-table .cross { color: #e74c3c; font-size: 1.2rem; }

/* ===== Projects ===== */
.projects-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 28px;
}
.project-card {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border-radius: 10px;
  overflow: hidden;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.project-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(232,185,74,0.25); }
.project-image {
  height: 200px;
  background: var(--secondary-bg);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  padding: 16px;
  text-align: center;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  border-bottom: 3px solid var(--accent);
}
.project-body { padding: 24px; flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
.project-body h3 {
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
}
.project-body p { color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 16px; flex: 1; }
.project-meta { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
.location-tag { color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 0.85rem; }
.location-tag i { color: var(--accent); margin-right: 4px; }
.badge {
  background: var(--accent);
  color: #fff;
  padding: 4px 12px;
  border-radius: 20px;
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
}

.cta-strip {
  background: var(--secondary-bg);
  padding: 60px 5%;
  text-align: center;
}
.cta-strip h3 {
  font-size: clamp(1.3rem, 2.5vw, 1.8rem);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 22px;
}

/* ===== Contact ===== */
.contact-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.4fr;
  gap: 48px;
}
.contact-info { background: var(--card-bg); padding: 36px; border-radius: 10px; }
.contact-info h3 {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 22px;
  color: var(--accent);
}
.contact-item {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  gap: 14px;
  padding: 14px 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
}
.contact-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.contact-item i { color: var(--accent); font-size: 1.2rem; margin-top: 4px; min-width: 22px; }
.contact-item strong { display: block; color: #fff; margin-bottom: 2px; }
.contact-item span, .contact-item a { color: var(--text-secondary); }
.contact-item a:hover { color: var(--accent); }

.contact-form { background: var(--card-bg); padding: 36px; border-radius: 10px; }
.contact-form h3 {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 22px;
  color: var(--accent);
}
.form-group { margin-bottom: 18px; }
.form-group label {
  display: block;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  margin-bottom: 6px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
}
.form-group input,
.form-group select,
.form-group textarea {
  width: 100%;
  padding: 12px 14px;
  background: var(--primary-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  border-radius: 6px;
  color: #fff;
  font-family: inherit;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  transition: border-color 0.3s ease;
}
.form-group input:focus,
.form-group select:focus,
.form-group textarea:focus {
  outline: none;
  border-color: var(--accent);
}
.map-section { padding: 0; }
.map-section iframe { width: 100%; height: 420px; border: none; display: block; }

/* ===== Footer ===== */
.footer {
  background: var(--primary-bg);
  padding: 70px 5% 0;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
}
.footer-grid {
  max-width: 1280px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1.4fr 1fr 1fr 1.2fr;
  gap: 40px;
}
.footer-col h4 {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 18px;
  color: var(--accent);
  font-size: 1rem;
}
.footer-col img { height: 60px; margin-bottom: 18px; }
.footer-col p { color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 14px; font-size: 0.92rem; }
.footer-col ul { list-style: none; }
.footer-col li { margin-bottom: 10px; }
.footer-col a { color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 0.92rem; }
.footer-col a:hover { color: var(--accent); }
.footer-col .contact-line { display: flex; gap: 10px; align-items: flex-start; margin-bottom: 10px; color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 0.92rem; }
.footer-col .contact-line i { color: var(--accent); margin-top: 4px; }
.tagline {
  color: #fff !important;
  font-family: 'Montserrat';
  font-weight: 600;
  font-style: italic;
}
.social-row { display: flex; gap: 12px; margin-top: 14px; }
.social-row a {
  width: 38px; height: 38px;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border-radius: 50%;
  color: #fff;
}
.social-row a:hover { background: var(--accent); color: #fff; }

.footer-bottom {
  max-width: 1280px;
  margin: 50px auto 0;
  padding: 22px 0;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  text-align: center;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  font-size: 0.88rem;
}
.ghana-stripe {
  display: flex;
  width: 100%;
  height: 6px;
}
.ghana-stripe span { flex: 1; height: 100%; }
.ghana-red { background: #ce1126; }
.ghana-gold { background: #fcd116; }
.ghana-green { background: #006b3f; }

/* ===== Responsive ===== */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
  .stats-grid, .why-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
  .services-grid, .testimonials-grid, .projects-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
  .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
}
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  section { padding: 50px 4%; }
  .hamburger { display: block; }
  .nav-menu {
    position: absolute;
    top: 100%; left: 0; right: 0;
    background: var(--primary-bg);
    flex-direction: column;
    padding: 20px;
    gap: 18px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
    display: none;
  }
  .nav-menu.open { display: flex; }
  .nav-menu .btn { width: 100%; text-align: center; }
  .two-col { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 32px; }
  .service-detail.reverse .two-col { direction: ltr; }
  .reasons-grid, .values-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .services-grid, .testimonials-grid, .projects-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .contact-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 28px; }
  .feature-list { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .comparison-table { font-size: 0.85rem; }
  .comparison-table th, .comparison-table td { padding: 10px; }
  .reg-card li strong { display: block; min-width: 0; }
}
@media (max-width: 480px) {
  .stats-grid, .why-grid, .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .hero-buttons { flex-direction: column; align-items: stretch; }
  .hero-buttons .btn { width: 100%; text-align: center; }
}

/* ===== Image-driven sections ===== */
.hero::before {
  background: rgba(0,0,0,0.65);
}
.col-image {
  background-color: var(--card-bg);
  min-height: 420px;
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
}
.col-image span { display: none; }
.project-image {
  height: 220px;
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  background-color: var(--secondary-bg);
}
.project-image span { display: none; }
.cta-banner { background: var(--accent-red); }
.stat-tile i,
.service-card i,
.why-tile i,
.reason-card i { color: #fff; filter: drop-shadow(0 2px 8px rgba(232,185,74,0.4)); }
.service-card { border-top-width: 4px; }
.author-photo { background: var(--accent); color: #fff; border-color: var(--accent); }
.testimonial-card .quote-mark { color: var(--accent-gold); }
.section-heading h2::after,
.two-col h2::after,
.mission-section h2::after,
.vision-section h2::after { background: var(--accent); height: 4px; width: 80px; }

/* Clients / Trusted-by grid */
.clients-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  gap: 24px;
  margin-top: 20px;
}
.client-tile {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 32px 20px;
  text-align: center;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 14px;
  transition: transform .25s ease, box-shadow .25s ease, border-color .25s ease;
}
.client-tile:hover {
  transform: translateY(-4px);
  border-color: var(--accent-green);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(232,185,74,0.18);
}
.client-tile i { font-size: 2rem; color: var(--accent); }
.client-tile span { color: #fff; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1rem; }
@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .clients-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
}

/* ===== Brochure styling overrides ===== */
.hero::before {
  background: rgba(0,0,0,0.72);
}
.cta-banner { background: var(--accent-red); }

/* Icon backgrounds (solid gold/yellow) */
.service-card,
.why-tile,
.reason-card,
.stat-tile {
  border-top: none;
  border-left: none;
}
.service-card { border-top: 4px solid var(--accent-green); }

.service-card i,
.why-tile i,
.reason-card i,
.stat-tile i,
.client-tile i {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  width: 64px;
  height: 64px;
  background: var(--accent);
  color: #fff;
  border-radius: 8px;
  font-size: 1.6rem;
  filter: none;
  margin-bottom: 18px;
}
.client-tile i { width: 56px; height: 56px; font-size: 1.4rem; }

/* Brochure image strip — full-bleed alternating image+text */
.brochure-strip {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 0;
  background: var(--secondary-bg);
}
.brochure-strip .img,
.brochure-strip .copy {
  min-height: 360px;
}
.brochure-strip .img {
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
}
.brochure-strip .copy {
  padding: 60px 6%;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
}
.brochure-strip .copy h2 {
  color: var(--accent);
  font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 3vw, 2.2rem);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 18px;
}
.brochure-strip .copy p { color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 14px; }
.brochure-strip.reverse .img { order: 2; }

/* Image mosaic — brochure-style picture grid */
.image-mosaic {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  grid-auto-rows: 200px;
  gap: 16px;
}
.image-mosaic .tile {
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  border-radius: 8px;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.image-mosaic .tile.wide { grid-column: span 2; }
.image-mosaic .tile.tall { grid-row: span 2; }
.image-mosaic .tile .label {
  position: absolute;
  left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0;
  background: linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.92), rgba(0,0,0,0));
  color: #fff;
  padding: 28px 18px 14px;
  font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
}
.image-mosaic .tile.accent {
  background: var(--accent);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  color: #fff;
  text-align: center;
  padding: 24px;
  font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
  font-weight: 800;
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1.5px;
}

@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .brochure-strip { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .brochure-strip.reverse .img { order: 0; }
  .image-mosaic { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); grid-auto-rows: 160px; }
  .image-mosaic .tile.wide { grid-column: span 2; }
}

/* Ghana stripe → brochure stripe (orange) */
.ghana-stripe { background: var(--accent); height: 6px; }
.ghana-stripe span { display: none; }

/* Footer accent */
.footer-col h4 { color: var(--accent); }


</style>


<header class="navbar">
  <div class="nav-container">
    <a href="/" class="nav-logo"><img src="/wp-content/uploads/nuvomaxx/nuvo_maxx.png" alt="NUVO MAXX logo" /></a>
    <button class="hamburger" aria-label="Toggle menu"><i class="fa-solid fa-bars"></i></button>
    <ul class="nav-menu">
      <li><a href="/">Home</a></li>
      <li><a href="/about/">About Us</a></li>
      <li><a href="/services/">Services</a></li>
      <li><a href="/why-us/" class="active">Why Us</a></li>
      <li><a href="/projects/">Projects</a></li>
      <li><a href="/contact/">Contact Us</a></li>
      <li><a href="/contact/" class="btn">Get a Quote</a></li>
    </ul>
  </div>
</header>

<main>
  <!-- IMAGE PLACEHOLDER: Black Ghanaian male business executive shaking hands with a logistics partner at a freight yard. -->
  <section class="hero page-hero" style="background-image: url('/wp-content/uploads/nuvomaxx/brochure-finance.png');">
    <div class="hero-content">
      <h1>Why Choose NUVO MAXX</h1>
      <p>Experience the difference of working with a logistics partner that truly understands Africa.</p>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section>
    <div class="container">
      <div class="section-heading">
        <h2>Eight Reasons Clients Stay With Us</h2>
        <p>The qualities that define how we work — and what you can expect every time.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="reasons-grid">
        <div class="reason-card"><i class="fa-solid fa-map-location-dot"></i><h3>Deep Regional Knowledge</h3><p>We operate from Tema — Ghana's freight capital — with reach across Burkina Faso, Nigeria, Mali, Niger, Togo, Côte d'Ivoire, and Morocco. We know the port systems, road networks, regulations, and business cultures. That knowledge translates directly into faster, smoother service for every client.</p></div>
        <div class="reason-card"><i class="fa-solid fa-hand-holding-dollar"></i><h3>Transparent Pricing</h3><p>Every quote we issue is clear and itemised. No hidden fees, no surprise charges at the end. You will always know exactly what you are paying for and why.</p></div>
        <div class="reason-card"><i class="fa-solid fa-route"></i><h3>End-to-End Capability</h3><p>From the moment you engage us to the moment your cargo or materials arrive at their destination, we handle every step. You do not need to coordinate multiple vendors — we do it all.</p></div>
        <div class="reason-card"><i class="fa-solid fa-shield-halved"></i><h3>Registered & Compliant</h3><p>NUVO MAXX is a fully registered Ghanaian business (Reg. No. BN858050923) operating in compliance with applicable laws and regulations across every market we serve. You can trust us with your cargo and your paperwork.</p></div>
        <div class="reason-card"><i class="fa-solid fa-truck-fast"></i><h3>Reliable Delivery</h3><p>We understand that delays cost money. Our team is structured around meeting timelines — and when challenges arise, we communicate proactively and find solutions fast.</p></div>
        <div class="reason-card"><i class="fa-solid fa-people-group"></i><h3>Experienced Team</h3><p>Our people have hands-on experience across freight, customs clearance, logistics coordination, and supply chain management in the diverse operating environments of West and North Africa.</p></div>
        <div class="reason-card"><i class="fa-solid fa-handshake"></i><h3>Strong Partner Network</h3><p>We have built working relationships with carriers, customs brokers, port handlers, and transport operators across the region that benefit every client we serve.</p></div>
        <div class="reason-card"><i class="fa-solid fa-headset"></i><h3>Client-Centred Service</h3><p>Every business is different. We listen to your needs, understand your constraints, and tailor our service accordingly — not the other way around.</p></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section style="background: var(--secondary-bg);">
    <div class="container">
      <div class="section-heading">
        <h2>How We Compare</h2>
        <p>See how NUVO MAXX stacks up against other logistics providers.</p>
      </div>
      <table class="comparison-table">
        <thead>
          <tr>
            <th>Criteria</th>
            <th class="brand">NUVO MAXX</th>
            <th>Other Providers</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          <tr><td>Local Expertise</td><td class="check">✅</td><td class="cross">❌</td></tr>
          <tr><td>Transparent Pricing</td><td class="check">✅</td><td class="cross">❌</td></tr>
          <tr><td>End-to-End Service</td><td class="check">✅</td><td class="cross">❌</td></tr>
          <tr><td>Registered Business</td><td class="check">✅</td><td class="check">✅</td></tr>
          <tr><td>Reliable Communication</td><td class="check">✅</td><td class="cross">❌</td></tr>
          <tr><td>Flexible Solutions</td><td class="check">✅</td><td class="cross">❌</td></tr>
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="cta-banner">
    <h2>Ready to experience the NUVO MAXX difference?</h2>
    <p>Get a clear quote and a partner you can rely on.</p>
    <a href="/contact/" class="btn btn-dark">Contact Us Today</a>
  </section>
</main>

<footer class="footer">
  <div class="footer-grid">
    <div class="footer-col">
      <img src="/wp-content/uploads/nuvomaxx/nuvo_maxx.png" alt="NUVO MAXX logo" />
      <p class="tagline">Project Management • Logistics • Cement Distribution • Consultancy • Business Development</p>
      <p>A registered Ghanaian company with operations in Burkina Faso, Nigeria, Mali, Niger, Togo, Côte d'Ivoire, and Morocco. Headquartered in Tema, Greater Accra.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="footer-col">
      <h4>Quick Links</h4>
      <ul>
        <li><a href="/">Home</a></li>
        <li><a href="/about/">About Us</a></li>
        <li><a href="/services/">Services</a></li>
        <li><a href="/why-us/">Why Choose Us</a></li>
        <li><a href="/projects/">Projects</a></li>
        <li><a href="/contact/">Contact Us</a></li>
      </ul>
    </div>
    <div class="footer-col">
      <h4>Our Services</h4>
      <ul>
        <li><a href="/services/">Freight Forwarding</a></li>
        <li><a href="/services/">Logistics Services</a></li>
        <li><a href="/services/">Cement Distribution</a></li>
        <li><a href="/services/">Customs Clearance</a></li>
        <li><a href="/services/">Last-Mile Delivery</a></li>
        <li><a href="/services/">Cargo Coordination</a></li>
      </ul>
    </div>
    <div class="footer-col">
      <h4>Contact</h4>
      <div class="contact-line"><i class="fa-solid fa-location-dot"></i><span>Tema Akosombo Road, Tema, Ghana</span></div>
      <div class="contact-line"><i class="fa-solid fa-phone"></i><span>0209157201</span></div>
      <div class="contact-line"><i class="fa-solid fa-phone"></i><span>0547110167</span></div>
      <div class="contact-line"><i class="fa-solid fa-envelope"></i><span>info@nuvomaxx.com</span></div>
      <div class="contact-line"><i class="fa-solid fa-globe"></i><span>www.nuvomaxx.com</span></div>
      <div class="social-row">
        <a href="#" aria-label="Facebook"><i class="fa-brands fa-facebook-f"></i></a>
        <a href="#" aria-label="Instagram"><i class="fa-brands fa-instagram"></i></a>
        <a href="#" aria-label="LinkedIn"><i class="fa-brands fa-linkedin-in"></i></a>
        <a href="#" aria-label="X / Twitter"><i class="fa-brands fa-x-twitter"></i></a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="footer-bottom">© 2024 NUVO MAXX. All Rights Reserved. | Reg. No. BN858050923 | Tema, Ghana</div>
  <div class="ghana-stripe"><span class="ghana-red"></span><span class="ghana-gold"></span><span class="ghana-green"></span></div>
</footer>

<script src="script.js"></script>

item.title: Projects
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
<style>

/* NUVO MAXX — Stylesheet */
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Montserrat:wght@400;600;700;800;900&family=Open+Sans:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap');

* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

:root {
  /* Ghana-inspired palette on a black canvas: red, gold/yellow, green. */
  --primary-bg: #000000;
  --secondary-bg: #0a0a0a;
  --card-bg: #141414;
  --light-grey: #e8e8e8;
  --mid-grey: #8a8a8a;
  --accent: #e8b94a;            /* Ghana gold / yellow */
  --accent-hover: #f0c860;
  --accent-gold: #e8b94a;
  --accent-red: #ce1126;        /* Ghana red */
  --accent-green: #006b3f;      /* Ghana green */
  --text-primary: #ffffff;
  --text-secondary: #c9c9c9;
  --border-subtle: #1f1f1f;
}

html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

body {
  font-family: 'Open Sans', 'Inter', sans-serif;
  background-color: var(--primary-bg);
  color: var(--text-primary);
  line-height: 1.65;
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
  position: relative;
}
body::before {
  content: '';
  position: fixed;
  inset: 0;
  background-image: url('images/nuvo-tree-ghana.png');
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  background-position: center center;
  background-size: min(1100px, 95vw) auto;
  mix-blend-mode: screen;
  opacity: 0.22;
  filter: contrast(1.05) saturate(1.1);
  z-index: 0;
  pointer-events: none;
}
body > * { position: relative; z-index: 1; }



h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 {
  font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
  font-weight: 800;
  line-height: 1.2;
  color: var(--text-primary);
}

a { color: var(--accent); text-decoration: none; transition: all 0.3s ease; }
a:hover { color: var(--accent-hover); }

img { max-width: 100%; display: block; }

/* ===== Navbar ===== */
.navbar {
  position: sticky;
  top: 0;
  z-index: 1000;
  background: var(--primary-bg);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
}
.nav-container {
  max-width: 1400px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 14px 5%;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 24px;
}
.nav-logo img { height: 116px; width: auto; }
.nav-menu {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 28px;
  list-style: none;
}
.nav-menu a {
  color: var(--text-primary);
  font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: 14px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  transition: color 0.3s ease;
}
.nav-menu a:hover { color: var(--accent); }
.nav-menu a.active { color: var(--accent); }

.btn {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 12px 26px;
  background: var(--accent);
  color: #fff;
  font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 14px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  border: 2px solid var(--accent);
  border-radius: 6px;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
}
.btn:hover { background: var(--accent-hover); border-color: var(--accent-hover); color: #fff; }
.btn-outline {
  background: transparent;
  color: #fff;
  border: 2px solid #fff;
}
.btn-outline:hover { background: #fff; color: var(--primary-bg); }
.btn-dark {
  background: var(--primary-bg);
  border-color: var(--primary-bg);
  color: #fff;
}
.btn-dark:hover { background: #000; border-color: #000; color: #fff; }

.hamburger {
  display: none;
  background: none;
  border: none;
  color: #fff;
  font-size: 26px;
  cursor: pointer;
}

/* ===== Hero ===== */
.hero {
  position: relative;
  min-height: 78vh;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  text-align: center;
  padding: 100px 5%;
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
}
.hero::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  background: rgba(10,10,10,0.72);
}
.hero-content { position: relative; z-index: 2; max-width: 900px; }
.hero h1 {
  font-size: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 3.6rem);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 22px;
}
.hero p {
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  margin-bottom: 36px;
  max-width: 720px;
  margin-left: auto;
  margin-right: auto;
}
.hero-buttons { display: flex; gap: 16px; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap; }

.page-hero { min-height: 48vh; }
.page-hero h1 { font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 4vw, 3rem); }

/* ===== Section base ===== */
section { padding: 80px 5%; }
.container { max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; }

.section-heading {
  text-align: center;
  margin-bottom: 56px;
}
.section-heading h2 {
  font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 3vw, 2.4rem);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 2px;
  position: relative;
  padding-bottom: 18px;
  display: inline-block;
}
.section-heading h2::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 0;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  width: 60px;
  height: 3px;
  background: var(--accent);
}
.section-heading p {
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  margin-top: 14px;
  max-width: 680px;
  margin-left: auto;
  margin-right: auto;
}

/* ===== Stats ===== */
.stats {
  background: var(--secondary-bg);
  padding: 50px 5%;
}
.stats-grid {
  max-width: 1280px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  gap: 24px;
}
.stat-tile {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  padding: 32px 22px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  text-align: center;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
}
.stat-tile:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(232,185,74,0.25); }
.stat-tile i { font-size: 2.4rem; color: var(--accent); margin-bottom: 14px; }
.stat-tile h3 { font-size: 1.25rem; margin-bottom: 6px; }
.stat-tile p { color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 0.9rem; }

/* ===== Services Cards ===== */
.services-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 28px;
}
.service-card {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border-top: 3px solid var(--accent);
  padding: 38px 28px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
}
.service-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(232,185,74,0.25); }
.service-card i { font-size: 2.6rem; color: var(--accent); margin-bottom: 18px; }
.service-card h3 { font-size: 1.35rem; margin-bottom: 14px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; }
.service-card p { color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 18px; }
.service-card a.learn-more {
  color: var(--accent);
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  font-size: 13px;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
}

/* ===== Why Tiles ===== */
.why-section { background: var(--secondary-bg); }
.why-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  gap: 24px;
}
.why-tile {
  text-align: center;
  padding: 28px 20px;
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border-radius: 10px;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
}
.why-tile:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(232,185,74,0.25); }
.why-tile i { font-size: 2.2rem; color: var(--accent); margin-bottom: 14px; }
.why-tile h4 { font-size: 1.1rem; margin-bottom: 10px; }
.why-tile p { color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 0.92rem; }
.see-all { text-align: center; margin-top: 36px; }
.see-all a { font-family: 'Montserrat'; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; }

/* ===== CTA Banner ===== */
.cta-banner {
  background: var(--accent);
  text-align: center;
  padding: 60px 5%;
}
.cta-banner h2 {
  font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 3vw, 2.2rem);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
  color: #fff;
}
.cta-banner p { color: #fff; margin-bottom: 26px; font-size: 1.05rem; }

/* ===== Testimonials ===== */
.testimonials-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 28px;
}
.testimonial-card {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  padding: 36px 28px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  position: relative;
  border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
}
.testimonial-card .quote-mark {
  font-size: 3rem;
  color: var(--accent);
  font-family: 'Montserrat';
  line-height: 1;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}
.testimonial-card blockquote { color: #fff; font-style: italic; margin-bottom: 20px; }
.testimonial-author {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 14px;
}
.author-photo {
  width: 54px;
  height: 54px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--secondary-bg);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  color: var(--accent);
  font-size: 1.5rem;
  border: 2px solid var(--accent);
}
.author-info strong { display: block; color: #fff; }
.author-info span { color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 0.88rem; }

/* ===== About Sections ===== */
.two-col {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 56px;
  align-items: center;
}
.two-col h2 {
  font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 3vw, 2.2rem);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 22px;
  position: relative;
  padding-bottom: 16px;
}
.two-col h2::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 0; left: 0;
  width: 60px; height: 3px;
  background: var(--accent);
}
.two-col p { color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 16px; }
.col-image {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border-radius: 10px;
  min-height: 380px;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  text-align: center;
  padding: 24px;
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
}

.mission-section, .vision-section {
  background: var(--secondary-bg);
  text-align: center;
}
.mission-section .container, .vision-section .container { max-width: 900px; }
.mission-section h2, .vision-section h2 {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 2px;
  font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 3vw, 2rem);
  margin-bottom: 20px;
  position: relative;
  padding-bottom: 16px;
  display: inline-block;
}
.mission-section h2::after, .vision-section h2::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 0; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%);
  width: 60px; height: 3px; background: var(--accent);
}
.mission-section p, .vision-section p { color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 1.1rem; }

.values-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  gap: 24px;
}
.value-tile {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  padding: 32px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  border-left: 4px solid var(--accent);
}
.value-tile h4 {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
  color: var(--accent);
}
.value-tile p { color: var(--text-secondary); }

.reg-card {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border-left: 4px solid var(--accent);
  padding: 32px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  max-width: 760px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}
.reg-card h3 {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
  color: var(--accent);
}
.reg-card ul { list-style: none; }
.reg-card li {
  padding: 10px 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  color: var(--text-secondary);
}
.reg-card li:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.reg-card li strong { color: #fff; display: inline-block; min-width: 200px; }

/* ===== Service Detail Sections ===== */
.service-detail { padding: 80px 5%; }
.service-detail:nth-child(even) { background: var(--secondary-bg); }
.service-detail .two-col { gap: 56px; }
.service-detail.reverse .two-col { direction: rtl; }
.service-detail.reverse .two-col > * { direction: ltr; }
.feature-list {
  list-style: none;
  margin-top: 22px;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 10px;
}
.feature-list li {
  color: #fff;
  padding-left: 26px;
  position: relative;
}
.feature-list li::before {
  content: '00c';
  font-family: 'Font Awesome 6 Free';
  font-weight: 900;
  color: var(--accent);
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
}

/* ===== Why Us reasons ===== */
.reasons-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  gap: 28px;
}
.reason-card {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  padding: 32px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
}
.reason-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(232,185,74,0.25); }
.reason-card i { font-size: 2rem; color: var(--accent); margin-bottom: 14px; }
.reason-card h3 {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
}
.reason-card p { color: var(--text-secondary); }

/* ===== Comparison Table ===== */
.comparison-table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border-radius: 10px;
  overflow: hidden;
  margin-top: 30px;
}
.comparison-table th, .comparison-table td {
  padding: 16px 20px;
  text-align: left;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
}
.comparison-table th {
  background: var(--secondary-bg);
  color: #fff;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
}
.comparison-table th.brand { color: var(--accent); }
.comparison-table td { color: var(--text-secondary); }
.comparison-table .check { color: #2ecc71; font-size: 1.2rem; }
.comparison-table .cross { color: #e74c3c; font-size: 1.2rem; }

/* ===== Projects ===== */
.projects-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 28px;
}
.project-card {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border-radius: 10px;
  overflow: hidden;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.project-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(232,185,74,0.25); }
.project-image {
  height: 200px;
  background: var(--secondary-bg);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  padding: 16px;
  text-align: center;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  border-bottom: 3px solid var(--accent);
}
.project-body { padding: 24px; flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
.project-body h3 {
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
}
.project-body p { color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 16px; flex: 1; }
.project-meta { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
.location-tag { color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 0.85rem; }
.location-tag i { color: var(--accent); margin-right: 4px; }
.badge {
  background: var(--accent);
  color: #fff;
  padding: 4px 12px;
  border-radius: 20px;
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
}

.cta-strip {
  background: var(--secondary-bg);
  padding: 60px 5%;
  text-align: center;
}
.cta-strip h3 {
  font-size: clamp(1.3rem, 2.5vw, 1.8rem);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 22px;
}

/* ===== Contact ===== */
.contact-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.4fr;
  gap: 48px;
}
.contact-info { background: var(--card-bg); padding: 36px; border-radius: 10px; }
.contact-info h3 {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 22px;
  color: var(--accent);
}
.contact-item {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  gap: 14px;
  padding: 14px 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
}
.contact-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.contact-item i { color: var(--accent); font-size: 1.2rem; margin-top: 4px; min-width: 22px; }
.contact-item strong { display: block; color: #fff; margin-bottom: 2px; }
.contact-item span, .contact-item a { color: var(--text-secondary); }
.contact-item a:hover { color: var(--accent); }

.contact-form { background: var(--card-bg); padding: 36px; border-radius: 10px; }
.contact-form h3 {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 22px;
  color: var(--accent);
}
.form-group { margin-bottom: 18px; }
.form-group label {
  display: block;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  margin-bottom: 6px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
}
.form-group input,
.form-group select,
.form-group textarea {
  width: 100%;
  padding: 12px 14px;
  background: var(--primary-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  border-radius: 6px;
  color: #fff;
  font-family: inherit;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  transition: border-color 0.3s ease;
}
.form-group input:focus,
.form-group select:focus,
.form-group textarea:focus {
  outline: none;
  border-color: var(--accent);
}
.map-section { padding: 0; }
.map-section iframe { width: 100%; height: 420px; border: none; display: block; }

/* ===== Footer ===== */
.footer {
  background: var(--primary-bg);
  padding: 70px 5% 0;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
}
.footer-grid {
  max-width: 1280px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1.4fr 1fr 1fr 1.2fr;
  gap: 40px;
}
.footer-col h4 {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 18px;
  color: var(--accent);
  font-size: 1rem;
}
.footer-col img { height: 60px; margin-bottom: 18px; }
.footer-col p { color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 14px; font-size: 0.92rem; }
.footer-col ul { list-style: none; }
.footer-col li { margin-bottom: 10px; }
.footer-col a { color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 0.92rem; }
.footer-col a:hover { color: var(--accent); }
.footer-col .contact-line { display: flex; gap: 10px; align-items: flex-start; margin-bottom: 10px; color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 0.92rem; }
.footer-col .contact-line i { color: var(--accent); margin-top: 4px; }
.tagline {
  color: #fff !important;
  font-family: 'Montserrat';
  font-weight: 600;
  font-style: italic;
}
.social-row { display: flex; gap: 12px; margin-top: 14px; }
.social-row a {
  width: 38px; height: 38px;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border-radius: 50%;
  color: #fff;
}
.social-row a:hover { background: var(--accent); color: #fff; }

.footer-bottom {
  max-width: 1280px;
  margin: 50px auto 0;
  padding: 22px 0;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  text-align: center;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  font-size: 0.88rem;
}
.ghana-stripe {
  display: flex;
  width: 100%;
  height: 6px;
}
.ghana-stripe span { flex: 1; height: 100%; }
.ghana-red { background: #ce1126; }
.ghana-gold { background: #fcd116; }
.ghana-green { background: #006b3f; }

/* ===== Responsive ===== */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
  .stats-grid, .why-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
  .services-grid, .testimonials-grid, .projects-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
  .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
}
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  section { padding: 50px 4%; }
  .hamburger { display: block; }
  .nav-menu {
    position: absolute;
    top: 100%; left: 0; right: 0;
    background: var(--primary-bg);
    flex-direction: column;
    padding: 20px;
    gap: 18px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
    display: none;
  }
  .nav-menu.open { display: flex; }
  .nav-menu .btn { width: 100%; text-align: center; }
  .two-col { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 32px; }
  .service-detail.reverse .two-col { direction: ltr; }
  .reasons-grid, .values-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .services-grid, .testimonials-grid, .projects-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .contact-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 28px; }
  .feature-list { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .comparison-table { font-size: 0.85rem; }
  .comparison-table th, .comparison-table td { padding: 10px; }
  .reg-card li strong { display: block; min-width: 0; }
}
@media (max-width: 480px) {
  .stats-grid, .why-grid, .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .hero-buttons { flex-direction: column; align-items: stretch; }
  .hero-buttons .btn { width: 100%; text-align: center; }
}

/* ===== Image-driven sections ===== */
.hero::before {
  background: rgba(0,0,0,0.65);
}
.col-image {
  background-color: var(--card-bg);
  min-height: 420px;
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
}
.col-image span { display: none; }
.project-image {
  height: 220px;
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  background-color: var(--secondary-bg);
}
.project-image span { display: none; }
.cta-banner { background: var(--accent-red); }
.stat-tile i,
.service-card i,
.why-tile i,
.reason-card i { color: #fff; filter: drop-shadow(0 2px 8px rgba(232,185,74,0.4)); }
.service-card { border-top-width: 4px; }
.author-photo { background: var(--accent); color: #fff; border-color: var(--accent); }
.testimonial-card .quote-mark { color: var(--accent-gold); }
.section-heading h2::after,
.two-col h2::after,
.mission-section h2::after,
.vision-section h2::after { background: var(--accent); height: 4px; width: 80px; }

/* Clients / Trusted-by grid */
.clients-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  gap: 24px;
  margin-top: 20px;
}
.client-tile {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 32px 20px;
  text-align: center;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 14px;
  transition: transform .25s ease, box-shadow .25s ease, border-color .25s ease;
}
.client-tile:hover {
  transform: translateY(-4px);
  border-color: var(--accent-green);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(232,185,74,0.18);
}
.client-tile i { font-size: 2rem; color: var(--accent); }
.client-tile span { color: #fff; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1rem; }
@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .clients-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
}

/* ===== Brochure styling overrides ===== */
.hero::before {
  background: rgba(0,0,0,0.72);
}
.cta-banner { background: var(--accent-red); }

/* Icon backgrounds (solid gold/yellow) */
.service-card,
.why-tile,
.reason-card,
.stat-tile {
  border-top: none;
  border-left: none;
}
.service-card { border-top: 4px solid var(--accent-green); }

.service-card i,
.why-tile i,
.reason-card i,
.stat-tile i,
.client-tile i {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  width: 64px;
  height: 64px;
  background: var(--accent);
  color: #fff;
  border-radius: 8px;
  font-size: 1.6rem;
  filter: none;
  margin-bottom: 18px;
}
.client-tile i { width: 56px; height: 56px; font-size: 1.4rem; }

/* Brochure image strip — full-bleed alternating image+text */
.brochure-strip {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 0;
  background: var(--secondary-bg);
}
.brochure-strip .img,
.brochure-strip .copy {
  min-height: 360px;
}
.brochure-strip .img {
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
}
.brochure-strip .copy {
  padding: 60px 6%;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
}
.brochure-strip .copy h2 {
  color: var(--accent);
  font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 3vw, 2.2rem);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 18px;
}
.brochure-strip .copy p { color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 14px; }
.brochure-strip.reverse .img { order: 2; }

/* Image mosaic — brochure-style picture grid */
.image-mosaic {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  grid-auto-rows: 200px;
  gap: 16px;
}
.image-mosaic .tile {
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  border-radius: 8px;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.image-mosaic .tile.wide { grid-column: span 2; }
.image-mosaic .tile.tall { grid-row: span 2; }
.image-mosaic .tile .label {
  position: absolute;
  left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0;
  background: linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.92), rgba(0,0,0,0));
  color: #fff;
  padding: 28px 18px 14px;
  font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
}
.image-mosaic .tile.accent {
  background: var(--accent);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  color: #fff;
  text-align: center;
  padding: 24px;
  font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
  font-weight: 800;
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1.5px;
}

@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .brochure-strip { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .brochure-strip.reverse .img { order: 0; }
  .image-mosaic { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); grid-auto-rows: 160px; }
  .image-mosaic .tile.wide { grid-column: span 2; }
}

/* Ghana stripe → brochure stripe (orange) */
.ghana-stripe { background: var(--accent); height: 6px; }
.ghana-stripe span { display: none; }

/* Footer accent */
.footer-col h4 { color: var(--accent); }


</style>
